programme.title: Imagine PlayWorld
programme.desc: In this episode, Fearne and Stephen guide you through a series of fun and creative projects, including making food fingertips with apple leather, crafting lime dancing crabs in under a minute, and designing a beach football with your fingertips.

programme.title: Imagine PlayWorld
programme.desc: Join Sid and Rebecca in an exciting episode of Let’s Play. Rebecca steps through the Magic Curtain today on a medical adventure. Has she got what it takes to be a Hospital Doctor and cure her patients‘ ‘unusual’ ailments, before it is time to head home? Find out as you play along with her in today’s show.

programme.title: Imagine PlayWorld
programme.desc: Join Sid and Rebecca in a brand new series of Let’s Play. Sid goes through the Magic Curtain today in an out of this world adventure to play astronauts. Will he find a missing robot on the moon before the meteor shower? Or will he meet a visiting alien before it’s time to head home for tea…? Find out in today’s episode.

programme.title: Imagine PlayWorld
programme.desc: Join Sid and Rebecca in a brand new episode of Let’s Play. Has Sid got what it takes to be a ballet dancer? Is he strong enough to lift the prima ballerina in the show and where will he find some new ballet shoes? Find out as you play along with him in the show today.

programme.title: Imagine PlayWorld
programme.desc: Join Sid and Rebecca in another exciting adventure. Today Rebecca steps through the Magic Curtain and goes to sea. Has she got what it takes to be the captain of an old fashioned sailing boat? Can she get her cargo of smelly fish to the port of Old Big Town in time? Find out as you play along with her in this fantastic episode.

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Do you want to upgrade your boring sneakers? We've collected simple shoe painting techniques anyone can repeat! After watching this video, you'll know how to paint sneakers using crayons, paints, and spray!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: You can make fantastic houses with your hands! Today we will show you step-by-step instructions on how to make a house on a tree from popsicle sticks and a huge magical house from cardboard you'll love!

programme.title: Imagine PlayWorld
programme.desc: Strange things must have happened in everyone's house at times. Do you agree with this? Everything is not quiet in our house today either! For example, the hands changed places with the feet!

programme.title: Imagine PlayWorld
programme.desc: We love to cook from things! For example today we will bake sneakers for breakfast. Don't miss out on unusual culinary innovations.

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Have you ever seen crafts made of buttons? Today Susie and Sam will show you how to make an incredible picture of Cinderella using buttons!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Sammy wants to watch TV! It means that we should make a cool TV out of cardboard! As a bonus, we showed how to make a bag printing machine from cardboard you'll really love!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: How to keep school supplies organized? Make a cool organizer! Today we will show you how to make an organizer that looks like a microwave!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Join us to make a realistic transformer truck and Sun&Moon mask from Five Nights At Freddy's! You will need cardboard and glue to make these incredible crafts.

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Do you know how to make the most beautiful pink mansion with a mini bedroom and bathroom? Today we will show you step-by-step instructions on how to make a cool miniature Kitty Café and pink house for a hamster.

programme.title: Imagine PlayWorld
programme.desc: In the Party Pad today, you can find out how to make fabulous furry monster pictures, and discover how Salvador Dalí painted monster-like creatures in his works of art.

programme.desc: Today is a super weird day because Sam is about to embark on a fantastic adventure he could never expect. Are you ready to join Sam and help him return to the present day? Then, let's get started!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hi friends! Today we'll create something super cool to help Sam remember everything. Can you guess what it is? A magical drawing board! Sounds fun, right? Also, we'll dive into a world of satisfying fidget toys. Let's get started!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hi friends! Today, we'll make an adventure for your beloved dolls. We're creating a stunning princess dress and adding dazzling accessories, plus loads more exciting activities that'll turn our princess dollhouse into a whirlwind of fun! But guess what else? Sammy's watching Barbie and her pals having a blast with a doll cake contest. Sammy's cooking up a plan, too! We're about to dive into making our very own miniature cake.

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Let's get ready for the party. Here’s a complete makeover with only viral beauty tools that you can perform right at home! Also, we've got plenty fun crafts for the party presents.

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hi everyone! Today our magnificent King Sam feels a bit blue without any pals around. But fear not because Sue is here to sprinkle some magic and turn an old doll into the enchanting Princess Peach to keep our dear king company. And we're about to dive headfirst into creating a mini-house straight out of the Super Mario universe! Are you ready to join in on the excitement today? Let's dive right in!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hi everyone! Are you ready for a super fun adventure today? We're diving into the world of DIY with a fantastic project: creating your very own makeup set! Let's dive in and get those creative gears spinning.

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hi friends! Today Sammy and Sue are on a mission to guide and help paper dolls in crafting a brand-new life. Watch as they design the most enchanting paper homes for our adorable paper friends. In this imaginative adventure, meet our new paper doll friend who's just emerged from a breakup and is ready for a total transformation. Our paper doll embraces a new chapter with the guidance of Sammy and Sue.

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hi friends! Sammy’s dreaming of a special adventure he’s never been on before—strolling along a moonlight beach. That's why we’re diving into painting a breathtaking moonlight scene that’ll leave everyone spellbound! Ready to dive in?

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hi everyone! Join us on this imaginative journey as we craft a Snow-Frozen Desk Organizer from colorful cardboard in the style of our favorite Elsa. But that's not all. Today we'll make something ultra-relaxing shimmering, frozen-themed slime that's as sparkly as it gets! Dive right in this fun DIY with us!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hi everyone! We're diving headfirst into the ultimate DIY adventure: building a miniature dollhouse fit for royalty!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hi friends! Hold onto your hats because our dolls are awaiting their fabulous makeover! They're getting brand-new stylish clothes and awesome accessories. Are you excited to join in on this makeover magic?

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hi, friends! Today we're cooking up some special doll food with a mini clay kitchen set that'll make our dolls jump for joy! But before we dive into the deliciousness, we need to create our spectacular kitchen using super fun colored clay.

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Guess what's happening today? We're diving into the world of colorful gems and glittery pink clay to create a fabulous princess outfit. Join the crafting party with Sam and Sue – it will be a blast!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hi everyone! Today we've got a super cool drawing plan for today! We'll draw something super magical – a unicorn and a mermaid ! And it will be sparkling with glitter, making it a rainbow of fun and color.

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Get ready for DIY fun with miniature versions of school supplies like clipboard, markers, tape, pencil case, sticky notes, pen, glue, scissors, rulers, and more!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Join us for seven easy and mind-blowing science experiments, followed by a galaxy-themed crafting session to create an anti-stress fidget toy!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Today we're creating a toy cash register shaped like a cat for Sam's supermarket! Then let's craft and play NBA basketball board game together!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Join us for a creative adventure as we craft delicious paper food treats and three stunning clay cakes: Egg Basket, Glittery Rainbow, and Beautiful Flower. Get ready to be amazed by these delightful creations!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Today Sam and Sue are crafting a brand-new makeup kit box for your doll, then transforming miniature school supplies into DIY masterpieces!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Let's create two super-cute clay cats with accessories like a litter box, cat feeder, food cans, bed, and scratching post. Also, Sam plans to make rainbow slime with a unicorn and glitter theme!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Join us as we dive into easy acrylic painting for beginners, crafting a serene ocean scene with a sunset sky, fluffy clouds, coconut trees, birds, a couple, and a sailing boat. Get ready for a relaxing and rewarding artistic journey!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Join us as we craft a magical and cute backpack organizer in the shape of a friendly giraffe using craft foam sheets! Plus, get ready to create an adorable avocado stationery case for your desk.

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Join us as we give quirky Barbies stunning makeovers, from refreshing their makeup and hairstyles to picking out perfect outfits and accessories. Get ready for jaw-dropping transformations!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Join us for a thrilling journey into the world of paper fidget toys with 12 exciting crafts, including colorful cubes, surprise avocado poppers, paper monkeys, spinning tops, and more! Then, watch as Sue and Sam transform cardboard into a homemade Tetris game, complete with colorful bricks, a level scale, and loads of fun!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hi friends! Guess what's brewing today? It's time for an enchanting outdoor escapade with the dynamic duo Sam and Roger! Get ready to embark on a thrilling nature journey where we'll unveil some nifty nature tricks and create our very own survival toolkit. Hold onto your hats because this adventure will be a fantastic ride!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Join Sue in transforming a sad doll into a Taylor Swift superstar with a DIY makeover, complete with custom clothing, spa treatments, and concert-worthy styling. Then, dive into Sue's paper nail salon for a Trolls-inspired manicure adventure, featuring paper nail art and press-on nails for a fabulous finish!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hi friends! Create a fun and glittery sticky goo factory from cardboard, and cook adorable fish-shaped buns in Kitty's street food truck! Let's jump right in and make some magic happen!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hi friends! Get ready to embark on an awesome crayon adventure with Sam and Sue! Create amazing crayon crafts like mermaid tails, colorful dinos, and melting crayon art. Together, we're going to turn those crayons into the awesome art and crafts you've ever seen! Plus, learn to draw Blue Heeler Puppy's family with glitter in this easy drawing tutorial! Are you pumped? Let's dive right in!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Cheer up your dolls with an exciting DIY plasticine playground featuring colorful swings, a pink slide, a see-saw, a carousel, and a mini skateboard. Add a basketball hoop for extra fun and muscle training. Then, join Sue as she crafts a charming mini house from popsicle sticks, complete with walls, a roof, windows, and doors. Watch the full video for a step-by-step guide to these fun and creative projects!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hey everyone! We'll show you how to create your own surprise-filled blind baggies with all the fun stuff inside. Get ready for crafting a special paper baggie learning kit about sea creatures. Join us as we dive into this delightful project. We'll create adorable paper puppies and pamper them with surprise blind bags. Unbox each bag to discover exciting treats and accessories for our paper pets, from colorful toys to cozy beds. Let's jump into the fun of unboxing these creative surprises!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hey friends! Imagine Sam dreaming of the wild Safari, but Sue's bringing it to life with fun paper crafts! Let's dive into the adventure! Gather colorful origami papers and fold fantastic animals. From soaring birds to swinging monkeys and snappy alligators, we'll craft a whole zoo of 12 awesome paper animals. It's easy and loads of fun!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hi friends! Today, we're diving into something cool: building a colorful watermelon house! Stay tuned to see this fruity dream unfold! And get ready for magic as we create the most fabulous Cinderella castle ever and give a doll a magical makeover into Cinderella herself! Let's jump in!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hi everyone! Today, get ready for a magical crafting adventure as we create a spectacular outfit for our beautiful Queen! Using clay, we'll craft a crown, dress, and shoes filled with glitz and glam. Let's dive in and sprinkle some sparkle!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Get ready to craft the ultimate dream house! It's gonna be legendary, so let's jump right in!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hi friends! Guess what? We have super exciting, sparkly crafts for you today! ! We've got a whole treasure trove of mermaid crafts waiting for us, from crafting a magical mermaid jewelry box to creating a shimmering mermaid bow with glitter galore and so much more! We're also making a magical make-up set out of glittery clay in Cinderella style! How cool is that? Let's dive in and make our fairytale come true!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hey friends! Today we'll create a doll with braided hair where we can store all our hairpins. It's both a chic hairstyle and a practical organizer! And that's not all — we're using balloons to craft stunning doll outfits. Excited to see how it all turns out?

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Sammy invited all the little ponies and their babies to a grand adventure, but they ended up covered in sticky mud. No worries though! Sue came to the rescue with a special mud remover. After cleaning up, each pony got a stunning Rainbow-style outfit. All the pony families were thrilled with the grand makeover results!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Today, we're making an amazing paper crafts: a rainbow mood indicator, an emotions board game, and lively toys from everyday materials. But wait, there's more! Join Sam on an epic dragon adventure with a playbook full of surprises! Battle games, giant dragons, puzzles, and DIY crafting—get ready for non-stop fun!

programme.title: Football Stars
programme.desc: N'Golo Kanté has won the biggest prizes over the past few seasons, but he remains humble. Sergio Ramos has won a lot of prizes during his career, but he is known for his lack of discipline. In this episode we celebrate the two extremities.

programme.title: Foul Play
programme.desc: The eight year suspension for doping of swimmer Sun Yang, the USA's Ryan Lochte is unmasked in Rio and the Australian Dawn Fraser hunts for memories at Tokyo 1964.

programme.title: GOAT - The Greatest Of All Time
programme.desc: Who is the greatest rugby player of all time?

programme.title: Fight Stars
programme.desc: In Fight Stars, find out about the greatest stars of combat sports, such as the British boxer Kell Brook, or the veteran Bernard Hopkins. Plus, discover the tattoos of some fighters, while Ronda Rousey has some great news to announce!

programme.title: Chill
programme.desc: Chill meets the girls of the Swatch Pro Tour in the south-west of France, the best riders and local talents in the freestyle section of the PKRA event in Mexico and the guys at the water skiing world cup in Australia.

programme.title: Chill
programme.desc: Chill heads to the antipodes to do some water skiing with the men's Action Tricks Comp and the women's Ski Jump. We examine in detail the women's longboard championships in the South China sea.

programme.title: Chill
programme.desc: Jarrad Howse takes Chill to the hidden surf destination of Tofino in Canada. Cold, humid and windy, but better still, a sublime surf! We meet the Pro's of the Cold Water Classic.

programme.title: Perfection
programme.desc: Snowboard superstar Shaun White carries off one gold medal after another, Italian cyclist Vincenzo Nibali wins the Tour de France, Adam Scott becomes the first Australian winner of the US Masters, the two best cricket players rewrite the history of their sport, and Ryan Lochte emerges from the shadow of Michael Phelps during the 2011 world swimming championships.

programme.title: Chill
programme.desc: Chill goes to Rio to follow some of the biggest names in surfing. An inside view with kitesurf world champion Youri Zoon and an intimate training session with a group of wakeboarders.

programme.title: Foul Play
programme.desc: The eight year suspension for doping of swimmer Sun Yang, the USA's Ryan Lochte is unmasked in Rio and the Australian Dawn Fraser hunts for memories at Tokyo 1964.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The first fight between Deontay Wilder and Tyson Fury was a modern heavyweight classic. In 1973, everything changed in women's tennis, and Billie Jean King led the charge.

programme.title: Football Stars
programme.desc: Jurgen Klopp has shown that you don't have to be grumpy to be a successful manager. Meanwhile, in footballing culture there are many ways to support a player or a team, from tattoos to statues, up to becoming a lookalike.

programme.title: Foul Play
programme.desc: Eric Cantona of Manchester United sees red, France's Zinedine Zidane tackles the 2006 World Cup head on and the Uruguayan Luis Suarez takes a new mouthful in Brazil.

programme.title: GOAT - The Greatest Of All Time
programme.desc: Who is the greatest F1 constructor of all time?

programme.title: Fight Stars
programme.desc: In Fight Stars, find out about the biggest world fighters, such as UFC champion Ovince Saint Preux or former boxer Mike Tyson. Plus, a look at the acting career of Michael Bisping and the man who has made UFC a success.

programme.title: Homage
programme.desc: There is something about footballers who make no excuses for what they are and we pay tribute to them: the fearless and incendiary Catalan Gerard Piqué, a Rio Ferdinand still in movement, and the shamefully talented Cristiano Ronaldo.

programme.title: Homage
programme.desc: Usain Bolt has lit up the athletics tracks and Cam Newton has marked American football, while Babe Ruth made baseball cool again in his own way.

programme.title: Homage
programme.desc: In this episode: it's the rebel who fought the power, Muhammad Ali, the man who fell from grace and returned all the better for it, Roberto Duran, and a man who looks like nothing special but has proved the contrary, Tony Bellew.

programme.title: Homage
programme.desc: In this episode, we pay homage to Italian footballers: Antonio Conte who has played and managed with passion, Paolo Maldini who took on another sporting career after football and Gianluigi Buffon who has never been afraid of words.

programme.title: Homage
programme.desc: David Beckham made his debut in 1992 and changed the world of football for ever. John Terry, who passed away his years at Chelsea by apologizing, and Kevin Prince who with his fight against racism has literally changed lifestyle.

programme.title: Homage
programme.desc: In this episode we pay tribute to three very dramatic individuals in football's story. That's Brazilian phenom Ronaldo, the ever controversial Argentine Carlos Tévez and British bad boy Joey Barton. To them all we pay homage.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Naomi Osaka won the 2018 US Open, but beaten finalist Serena Williams stole the show. Andy Ruis Jr should not have fought Anthony Joshua in 2019, but he left Madison Square Garden as world heavyweight champion.

programme.title: Football Stars
programme.desc: Leonardo Bonucci is keeping the great tradition of Italian central defenders alive. Goran Pandev retires as a legend, and we discover the stars who pay as much attention to their hairstyles as their skills!

programme.title: Foul Play
programme.desc: American gymnast Simone Biles faces up to the disappointments and dissimulations of Larry Nassar, and Tonya Harding harms her greatest rival in ice skating.

programme.title: GOAT - The Greatest Of All Time
programme.desc: Who are the greatest reckless athletes of all time?

programme.title: Fight Stars
programme.desc: In Fight Stars, find out about the world's best fighters, including heavyweight boxers Anthony Joshua and Wladimir Klitschko, as well as Ricky Hatton's big comeback and the greatest trash talker of all time, Muhammad Ali.

programme.title: Homage
programme.desc: Conor McGregor is a man with a motor mouth, full pockets and a mean punch. Ronda Rousey also shot her mouth off to be a part of the UFC, going on to make history in the competition. In this episode of Homage, we pay tribute to the two people who changed the sport of MMA with their talent forever.

programme.title: Homage
programme.desc: In this episode, we pay homage to the emblematic rivalries of football, starting with the Argentine vendetta between Boca Juniors and River Plate, but also two derbies which are a little more good natured, Inter Milan vs AC Milan and Liverpool vs Everton.

programme.title: Homage
programme.desc: We pay homage to two great tennis rivalries: the stars of the modern game Nadal and Federer, two players who became friends, Martina Navratilova and Chris Evert and those who did not appreciate each other, like Sampras and Agassi.

programme.title: Homage
programme.desc: In this episode, we pay homage to the great international footballing rivalries: that between Brazil and Argentina, and those which continue rivalries that began on the battlefield, like Germany vs Holland and England vs Scotland.

programme.title: Homage
programme.desc: In this episode we pay homage to some of the rivalries that have come and gone at Arsenal football club. That's long time manager Arsene Wenger's feud with José Mourinho, former star Patrick Vieira's gripe with Manchester United hard man Roy Keane, the clashes with Tottenham in the North London Derby, and Arsenal fans' beef with their owner.

programme.title: Homage
programme.desc: We pay tribute to the battle which takes place between the United States and New Zealand during the America's Cup, the long rivalry between India and Pakistan in cricket and the visceral antagonism between Europe and the USA in the Ryder Cup.

programme.title: Flashpoint

programme.title: Homage

programme.title: Homage
programme.desc: In this episode we pay homage to some of the rivalries that have come and gone at Arsenal football club. programme.title: Homage

programme.title: National Icons

programme.title: Top 11

programme.title: Dream Teams

programme.title: Homage
programme.desc: We pay homage to two great tennis rivalries: the stars of the modern game Nadal and Federer, two players who became friends, Martina Navratilova and Chris Evert and those who did not appreciate each other, like Sampras and Agassi.

programme.title: Dream Teams
programme.desc: Who would join Pete Sampras in the ideal US team for the Davis Cup? Plus, which players of Czech origin would be in the ultimate Fed Cup team? Then we select the best tennis players of the 1990s in the programme that dares to dream!

programme.title: Stuart Cooper Films - The Craig Jones Story
programme.desc:
A short documentary telling the story of Craig Jones' sudden rise to success after his upset victory over Leandro Lo at ADCC 2017. After his breakout performance at ADCC, Craig went on to beat many more big names such as Jake Shields In Polaris, and made it to the finals of EBI, where he had a close finals match against Gordon Ryan. Since then Craig has competed in some of the biggest tournaments in the world and his life has changed dramatically. In this film we see that it wasn't always an easy road for him.
Director Stuart Cooper

programme.title: Superfight - Andre Galvao vs Braulio Estima by Stuart Cooper
programme.desc: In this video Andre Galvao looks back on his match with Braulio Estima for the ADCC 2013 Super Fight Title. Then, Andre recaps on some of his most entertaining matches from ADCC 2011, which include; Don Ortega, Gunnar Nelson, Pablo Popovitch, Rousimar "Toquinho" Palhares and Sergio Moraes.

programme.title: Tap Out Challenge - Oceanside
programme.desc: On October 15th at the picturesque Oceanside, CA, Charles Rials embarked on an incredible BJJ journey, challenging strangers from all walks of life to tap me out and claim $100. But there was a twist that none of them saw coming! Win or Lose, they got the MONEY!!! What they all shared was the courage to step up, the passion to engage, and the heart of a warrior. This video isn't just about BJJ or the challenge — it's a celebration of the human spirit, perseverance, and the unexpected twists that life (and jiu jitsu) can throw our way. Join Charles in this heartwarming, adrenaline-pumping journey where every challenge was met with respect, and every challenger was met with a surprise. Whether you're a BJJ enthusiast or someone who loves to witness genuine human moments, this video has something special for you.

programme.title: ADCC - Denver Opens
programme.desc: The Opens make their way to the mile high city where the best martial arts from the US look to stake their claim for supremacy as the circuit heats up. In this heart-pounding instalment, we bring you all the action from the epic showdown held in the magnificent city of Denver. Former UFC Strawweight Champion of the World Rose Namajunas known for her exceptional martial arts abilities, Rose is now ready to put her skills to the ultimate test in the realm of grappling. Witness her transition from the cage to the mats, as she grapples her way through some of the most intense matches of her career. ADCC Opens superstar and prodigy 16-year-old phenom, Helena Craver, steps onto the mats to showcase her unparalleled talent. With her sights set on glory, she aims to conquer the teenage, adults, and absolute divisions a feat that has never been done before. In a clash of titans, long time elite grappler Ryan Aitkens, a formidable competitor in his own right, is set to go head-to-head against the multiple-time world champion, Mateus Lutes. Brace yourself for an explosive battle between these two grappling juggernauts, as they leave everything on the mats in pursuit of victory.

programme.title: 10pQ 19 - The Middleweights

programme.title: 10th Planet Jiu Jitsu - 20 Years in Orbit
programme.desc: Discover the pivotal moments that defined 10th Planet Jiu Jitsu's journey, a revolutionary evolution to the art of Jiu Jitsu that forever changed the landscape of martial arts that continues to shape the world of grappling. Join us as we celebrate this momentous anniversary, paying homage to the visionaries and pioneers who propelled this art form to new heights. Don't miss this must-watch documentary that will leave you inspired and in awe of the remarkable journey of 10th Planet Jiu Jitsu.

programme.title: American Grappling - Seattle
programme.desc: American Grappling heads to Seattle, Washington. Coach Morgan heads to the world-famous Pike’s Market and get a taste of the Northwest. Our featured competitor is the black belt Nathan Orchard. Nathan is looking to make Team USA to tick the final box of his career…win a grappling world championship…but he’ll have to get past Eric Spence. Eric has wrestled his whole life and competed on a wrestling US World team. It’s the traditional clash of styles between wrestling and jiujitsu. Find out who’ll end up on top and secure their spot at the world team trials.

programme.title: American Grappling - St. Louis
programme.desc: On this episode of American Grappling, the Qualifiers for 2024 have officially started ! This episode we see what talent the midwest has to offer with the Qualifiers being hosted in St Louis. Experience the city, the people and of course grappling as the USA Grappling team begin to build their new team for the World Championships. Directed, shot and edited by Anthony Kadel Produced by The Grappling Network

programme.title: American Grappling Podcast- Ft. Dr. Ivan Rascon Aguilar
programme.desc: In this Episode of the AGF Podcast, Brandon Quick interviews Gastroenterologist Ivan Rascon - Aguilar, MD about the health benefits of the Carnivore Diet, how its changed Brandon’s life and how Dr. Rascon - Aguilar is helping hundreds reverse preventable diseases and how a dietary and lifestyle change can improve wellness and athletic performance. Keep an eye out for more American Grappling Federation content here on The Grappling Network.

programme.title: BJJ Classics - Grapplers Quest West Coast
programme.desc: Grapplers Quest was founded in 1996 and began the submission grappling fever throughout the martial arts world and set Grapplers Quest as the premiere submission grappling event. Check out these old school No Gi matches featuring UFC Champion B.J. Penn taking on Mike Cardoso- ADCC U.S. Trials Champion. Pioneering athletes like Marc Laimon, Dean Lister, Jeff ""Snowman"" Monson, Chris Brennan, Tony Desouza, Alexandre Dantas, Homer Moore, Alberto Crane, J.D. Penn, Garth Taylor and Sean Spangler. Don't miss the event that started a legacy in the sport of submission grappling and revoltionized ground fighting in the martial arts world."

programme.title: BJJ Classics - Grappling All-Stars
programme.desc: Grappling All Stars is a collection of the world's best grapplers in action on the mat from the OTM archives. Featuring; Renner Gracie, BJ Penn, Diego Sanchez, Jeff Glover, Dean Lister, and many more!

programme.title: BJJ Classics - Submissions 101 Chapter 2
programme.desc: Submissions 101 Chapter 2 features the top grapplers showing you their best setups and submissions. A new feature in this sequel includes submissions broken down into categories which include: arm attacks, chokes, leg attacks, triangles, and other attacks. These old school matches are a great learning tool for anyone beginning their submission training or advanced grapplers looking to add new tools to their game. 101 Submissions Chapter 2 includes over 1 year of competition footage from around the world compressed into 48 minutes of intense action from the greatest events in the globe.

programme.title: BJJ Trickster Episode 6

programme.title: BJJ Trickster Episode 7

programme.title: BJJ Trickster Episode 8
programme.desc: This Episode breaks down the double buggy choke from 10pQ 19, Geo Martinez's twister, Genki Sudo's flying triangle, and Tarik Hopstock's Tarikoplata.

programme.title: BJJ Trickster Episode 9
programme.desc: This episode breaks down Keenan Cornelius' Reverse Omoplata, Craig Jones' Inside Sankaku, Lachlan Giles' heel hook attacks and Grace “The Silent Assassin” Gundrum.

programme.desc: Your ultimate destination for the most up-to-date and comprehensive coverage of the world of soccer. Stay ahead in the game as we deliver breaking news, exclusive interviews, and in-depth analyses from the dynamic realm of football.

programme.title: 10pQ 19 - The Middleweights
programme.desc: A 16-man jiu jitsu tournament. Eddie Bravo has invited warriors from the top moons in the 10th Planet Jiu Jitsu system for a qualifier tournament at the Headquarters in Downtown Los Angeles. The winner will go on to compete on the big stage at Combat Jiu Jitsu Worlds

programme.title: 10th Planet Jiu Jitsu - 20 Years in Orbit
programme.desc: Discover the pivotal moments that defined 10th Planet Jiu Jitsu's journey, a revolutionary evolution to the art of Jiu Jitsu that forever changed the landscape of martial arts that continues to shape the world of grappling. Join us as we celebrate this momentous anniversary, paying homage to the visionaries and pioneers who propelled this art form to new heights. Don't miss this must-watch documentary that will leave you inspired and in awe of the remarkable journey of 10th Planet Jiu Jitsu.

programme.title: American Grappling - Seattle
programme.desc: American Grappling heads to Seattle, Washington. Coach Morgan heads to the world-famous Pike’s Market and get a taste of the Northwest. Our featured competitor is the black belt Nathan Orchard. Nathan is looking to make Team USA to tick the final box of his career…win a grappling world championship…but he’ll have to get past Eric Spence. Eric has wrestled his whole life and competed on a wrestling US World team. It’s the traditional clash of styles between wrestling and jiujitsu. Find out who’ll end up on top and secure their spot at the world team trials.

programme.title: American Grappling - St. Louis
programme.desc: On this episode of American Grappling, the Qualifiers for 2024 have officially started ! This episode we see what talent the midwest has to offer with the Qualifiers being hosted in St Louis. Experience the city, the people and of course grappling as the USA Grappling team begin to build their new team for the World Championships. Directed, shot and edited by Anthony Kadel Produced by The Grappling Network

programme.title: American Grappling Podcast- Ft. Dr. Ivan Rascon Aguilar
programme.desc: In this Episode of the AGF Podcast, Brandon Quick interviews Gastroenterologist Ivan Rascon - Aguilar, MD about the health benefits of the Carnivore Diet, how its changed Brandon’s life and how Dr. Rascon - Aguilar is helping hundreds reverse preventable diseases and how a dietary and lifestyle change can improve wellness and athletic performance. Keep an eye out for more American Grappling Federation content here on The Grappling Network.

programme.title: BJJ Classics - Grapplers Quest West Coast
programme.desc: Grapplers Quest was founded in 1996 and began the submission grappling fever throughout the martial arts world and set Grapplers Quest as the premiere submission grappling event. Check out these old school No Gi matches featuring UFC Champion B.J. Penn taking on Mike Cardoso- ADCC U.S. Trials Champion. Pioneering athletes like Marc Laimon, Dean Lister, Jeff ""Snowman"" Monson, Chris Brennan, Tony Desouza, Alexandre Dantas, Homer Moore, Alberto Crane, J.D. Penn, Garth Taylor and Sean Spangler. Don't miss the event that started a legacy in the sport of submission grappling and revoltionized ground fighting in the martial arts world."

programme.title: BJJ Classics - Grappling All-Stars
programme.desc: Grappling All Stars is a collection of the world's best grapplers in action on the mat from the OTM archives. Featuring; Renner Gracie, BJ Penn, Diego Sanchez, Jeff Glover, Dean Lister, and many more!

programme.title: BJJ Classics - Submissions 101 Chapter 2
programme.desc: Submissions 101 Chapter 2 features the top grapplers showing you their best setups and submissions. A new feature in this sequel includes submissions broken down into categories which include: arm attacks, chokes, leg attacks, triangles, and other attacks. These old school matches are a great learning tool for anyone beginning their submission training or advanced grapplers looking to add new tools to their game. 101 Submissions Chapter 2 includes over 1 year of competition footage from around the world compressed into 48 minutes of intense action from the greatest events in the globe.

programme.title: BJJ Trickster Episode 6
programme.desc: This Episode features technique breakdowns of Ryan Hall, Kron Gracie, Jeremiah Vance, Cora Sek, and Jon 'Thor' Blank.

programme.title: BJJ Trickster Episode 7
programme.desc: This episode includes breakdowns of Clark Gracie's and Baret Yoshida's Crucifixes, Nathan Orchard's signature move, The Dead Orchard and Marcelo Garcia's arm drag.

programme.title: BJJ Trickster Episode 8
programme.desc: This Episode breaks down the double buggy choke from 10pQ 19, Geo Martinez's twister, Genki Sudo's flying triangle, and Tarik Hopstock's Tarikoplata.

programme.title: BJJ Trickster Episode 9
programme.desc: This episode breaks down Keenan Cornelius' Reverse Omoplata, Craig Jones' Inside Sankaku, Lachlan Giles' heel hook attacks and Grace “The Silent Assassin” Gundrum.

programme.title: Black Sheep Boxing with Zack Moore - 10pATX
programme.desc: After struggling with addiction himself, Jeff Meadows opened Black Sheep Boxing along with his friend Sky Wood with the purpose of giving recovering addicts an opportunity to turn their lives around. Join 10th Planet ATX's Zack Moore as he visits Black Sheep Boxing to learn the art of boxing.

programme.title: BJJ Trickster Episode 4
programme.desc: Breaking down Gordon Ryan's shoulder crunch sumi gaeshi, and leg locks from Garry Tonon, Mikey Musumeci, and Eddie Cummings.

programme.title: BJJ Trickster Episode 5
programme.desc: This Episode features techniques from Sean Roberts, Joe Rogan, Mackenzie Dern, and Khabib Nurmagomedov.

programme.title: BJJ Trickster Episode 6
programme.desc: This Episode features technique breakdowns of Ryan Hall, Kron Gracie, Jeremiah Vance, Cora Sek, and Jon 'Thor' Blank.

programme.title: Breaking - Bboy Network - Make History III
programme.desc: Make History III: Breakdancing"" showcases the world's top B-Boys and B-Girls in a thrilling competition of gravity-defying moves and intense rivalries. Witness electrifying performances and raw energy as these dancers battle for supremacy and make history. Filmed by BBoyNetwork

programme.title: Breaking - Bboy Network - World Breaking Classic USA Qualifier 2024
programme.desc: Catch the excitement of the World Breaking Classic (WBC) USA Qualifier. Witness some of the world's best breakers compete in 2-on-2 battles at the iconic Cain's Ballroom in Tulsa, OK. The winning duo earns a spot in the WBC World Final 2024. Join us as we build the breaking champions of tomorrow, stay true to our cultural heritage, and inspire millions with the self-reinventing power of breaking. We are Classic

programme.title: College Wrestling - 2023 NWCA Semifinals - Club Division - Apprentice vs Liberty
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Collegiate Grappling - Matador Madness
programme.desc:
Welcome to the 2024 Collegiate Grappling series here at Cal State Northridge with the 1st annual Matador Madness tournament.
We’ve got colleges and universities from all over the State converging here to test their grappling skills featuring UC San Diego, Cal Poly Pomona, San Diego State University, UC Berkley, UCLA and Cal State Northridge

programme.title: Costa Mesa Short - David Azure
programme.desc: Costa Mesa Short - David Azure

programme.title: CPI - Sean O'Malley Recovers with Stem Cells
programme.desc: Anthony Kadel and Michael Plaster go to The Cellular Performance Institute in Tijuana, Mexico to cover the UFC's #1 ranked Bantamweight, "Suga" Sean O'Malley and his Coach Tim Welch. Spend a day with Sean and Tim as they embark on the road to recovery at the premier stem cell hospital. Presented by The Grappling Network.

programme.title: Dean Lister - Why Would You ignore 50% Of The Human Body?
programme.desc: In this video, Dean talks about when he first started using leg locks effectively in competition and submitting some of the biggest names in the sport. Plus, the 2012 Heavy Weight World Championships; Rodolfo Vieira vs Xande Ribeiro.

programme.title: Dean Lister - People Want to See Submissions by Stuart Cooper
programme.desc: Dean Lister discusses his training, competition mindset, and his style of grappling. Then, Dean Lister teaches a butterfly sweep and some leg locks.

programme.title: Eight in Roulette Combat Jiu Jitsu - St. Petersburg, Russia
programme.desc: Eight in Roulette Combat Jiu Jitsu - St. Petersburg, Russia

programme.title: El Coyote by Hook Thieves - Music Video Behind The Scenes
programme.desc: Follow 10th Planet Jiu Jitsu Founder Eddie Bravo as he shots his music video for his band- Hook Thieves, for their hit song “El Coyote”. Eddie partners with award winning music video Director Embryo at Studio 60 in Los Angeles to film a dramatic interaction between struggling migrants and border patrol agents. Check out the exclusive interviews and highlights from the music video, unexpected moments and stick around for the FULL music video.

programme.title: Elvira Karppinen - The Viking Spirit Documentary
programme.desc: Elvira Karppinen and her husband Lauri are a Finnish jiu jitsu black belt couple. This documentary follows Elvira through the trials and tribulations of competition, injury and demonstrating her Viking Spirit philosophy.

programme.title: Finishers 13 - The Absolutes
programme.desc: A sub only Jiu-Jitsu tournament hosted at 10th Planet Bethlehem.

programme.title: Garry Tonon - ADCC 2013 Breakout Performance
programme.desc: Kron Gracie reflects on his match with Garry Tonon and Joe Rogan and Eddie Bravo share their thoughts on the match and Garry's ADCC performance.

programme.title: Greco Roman Olympian - Robby Smith
programme.desc: Greco Roman Olympian - Robby Smith

programme.title: Gene Lebell vs Milo Savage 1963

programme.title: Stuart Cooper Films - The Craig Jones Story
programme.desc:
A short documentary telling the story of Craig Jones' sudden rise to success after his upset victory over Leandro Lo at ADCC 2017. After his breakout performance at ADCC, Craig went on to beat many more big names such as Jake Shields In Polaris, and made it to the finals of EBI, where he had a close finals match against Gordon Ryan. Since then Craig has competed in some of the biggest tournaments in the world and his life has changed dramatically. In this film we see that it wasn't always an easy road for him.
Director Stuart Cooper

programme.title: Superfight - Andre Galvao vs Braulio Estima by Stuart Cooper
programme.desc: In this video Andre Galvao looks back on his match with Braulio Estima for the ADCC 2013 Super Fight Title. Then, Andre recaps on some of his most entertaining matches from ADCC 2011, which include; Don Ortega, Gunnar Nelson, Pablo Popovitch, Rousimar "Toquinho" Palhares and Sergio Moraes.

programme.title: Tap Out Challenge - Oceanside
programme.desc: On October 15th at the picturesque Oceanside, CA, Charles Rials embarked on an incredible BJJ journey, challenging strangers from all walks of life to tap me out and claim $100. But there was a twist that none of them saw coming! Win or Lose, they got the MONEY!!! What they all shared was the courage to step up, the passion to engage, and the heart of a warrior. This video isn't just about BJJ or the challenge — it's a celebration of the human spirit, perseverance, and the unexpected twists that life (and jiu jitsu) can throw our way. Join Charles in this heartwarming, adrenaline-pumping journey where every challenge was met with respect, and every challenger was met with a surprise. Whether you're a BJJ enthusiast or someone who loves to witness genuine human moments, this video has something special for you.

programme.title: ADCC - Denver Opens
programme.desc: The Opens make their way to the mile high city where the best martial arts from the US look to stake their claim for supremacy as the circuit heats up. In this heart-pounding instalment, we bring you all the action from the epic showdown held in the magnificent city of Denver. Former UFC Strawweight Champion of the World Rose Namajunas known for her exceptional martial arts abilities, Rose is now ready to put her skills to the ultimate test in the realm of grappling. Witness her transition from the cage to the mats, as she grapples her way through some of the most intense matches of her career. ADCC Opens superstar and prodigy 16-year-old phenom, Helena Craver, steps onto the mats to showcase her unparalleled talent. With her sights set on glory, she aims to conquer the teenage, adults, and absolute divisions a feat that has never been done before. In a clash of titans, long time elite grappler Ryan Aitkens, a formidable competitor in his own right, is set to go head-to-head against the multiple-time world champion, Mateus Lutes. Brace yourself for an explosive battle between these two grappling juggernauts, as they leave everything on the mats in pursuit of victory.

programme.title: CPI - Sean O'Malley Recovers with Stem Cells
programme.desc: Anthony Kadel and Michael Plaster go to The Cellular Performance Institute in Tijuana, Mexico to cover the UFC's #1 ranked Bantamweight, "Suga" Sean O'Malley and his Coach Tim Welch. Spend a day with Sean and Tim as they embark on the road to recovery at the premier stem cell hospital. Presented by The Grappling Network.

programme.title: CPI Podcast - Sean O'Malley & Tim Welch
programme.desc: CPI Stem Cell Co-Founder Scotty Nelson hosts episode 4 of The CPI Podcast with UFC all-star "Suga" Sean O'Malley and Tim Welch, both flying out from Phoenix, AZ for treatment at @CPIStemCells Sean came down to get stem cell injections in a knee that had been bothering him for years and Tim opted for shoulder injections and a full-body stem cell IV. These treatments have been changing the way combat athletes heal & recover and we are happy to have been able to serve these awesome guys!

programme.title: 10pQ 19 - The Middleweights

programme.title: 10th Planet Jiu Jitsu - 20 Years in Orbit
programme.desc: Discover the pivotal moments that defined 10th Planet Jiu Jitsu's journey, a revolutionary evolution to the art of Jiu Jitsu that forever changed the landscape of martial arts that continues to shape the world of grappling. Join us as we celebrate this momentous anniversary, paying homage to the visionaries and pioneers who propelled this art form to new heights. Don't miss this must-watch documentary that will leave you inspired and in awe of the remarkable journey of 10th Planet Jiu Jitsu.

programme.title: American Grappling - Seattle
programme.desc: American Grappling heads to Seattle, Washington. Coach Morgan heads to the world-famous Pike’s Market and get a taste of the Northwest. Our featured competitor is the black belt Nathan Orchard. Nathan is looking to make Team USA to tick the final box of his career…win a grappling world championship…but he’ll have to get past Eric Spence. Eric has wrestled his whole life and competed on a wrestling US World team. It’s the traditional clash of styles between wrestling and jiujitsu. Find out who’ll end up on top and secure their spot at the world team trials.

programme.title: American Grappling - St. Louis
programme.desc: On this episode of American Grappling, the Qualifiers for 2024 have officially started ! This episode we see what talent the midwest has to offer with the Qualifiers being hosted in St Louis. Experience the city, the people and of course grappling as the USA Grappling team begin to build their new team for the World Championships. Directed, shot and edited by Anthony Kadel Produced by The Grappling Network

programme.title: American Grappling Podcast- Ft. Dr. Ivan Rascon Aguilar
programme.desc: In this Episode of the AGF Podcast, Brandon Quick interviews Gastroenterologist Ivan Rascon - Aguilar, MD about the health benefits of the Carnivore Diet, how its changed Brandon’s life and how Dr. Rascon - Aguilar is helping hundreds reverse preventable diseases and how a dietary and lifestyle change can improve wellness and athletic performance. Keep an eye out for more American Grappling Federation content here on The Grappling Network.

programme.title: BJJ Classics - Grapplers Quest West Coast
programme.desc: Grapplers Quest was founded in 1996 and began the submission grappling fever throughout the martial arts world and set Grapplers Quest as the premiere submission grappling event. Check out these old school No Gi matches featuring UFC Champion B.J. Penn taking on Mike Cardoso- ADCC U.S. Trials Champion. Pioneering athletes like Marc Laimon, Dean Lister, Jeff ""Snowman"" Monson, Chris Brennan, Tony Desouza, Alexandre Dantas, Homer Moore, Alberto Crane, J.D. Penn, Garth Taylor and Sean Spangler. Don't miss the event that started a legacy in the sport of submission grappling and revoltionized ground fighting in the martial arts world."

programme.title: BJJ Classics - Grappling All-Stars
programme.desc: Grappling All Stars is a collection of the world's best grapplers in action on the mat from the OTM archives. Featuring; Renner Gracie, BJ Penn, Diego Sanchez, Jeff Glover, Dean Lister, and many more!

programme.title: BJJ Classics - Submissions 101 Chapter 2
programme.desc: Submissions 101 Chapter 2 features the top grapplers showing you their best setups and submissions. A new feature in this sequel includes submissions broken down into categories which include: arm attacks, chokes, leg attacks, triangles, and other attacks. These old school matches are a great learning tool for anyone beginning their submission training or advanced grapplers looking to add new tools to their game. 101 Submissions Chapter 2 includes over 1 year of competition footage from around the world compressed into 48 minutes of intense action from the greatest events in the globe.

programme.title: BJJ Trickster Episode 6
programme.desc: This Episode features technique breakdowns of Ryan Hall, Kron Gracie, Jeremiah Vance, Cora Sek, and Jon 'Thor' Blank.

programme.title: BJJ Trickster Episode 7
programme.desc: This episode includes breakdowns of Clark Gracie's and Baret Yoshida's Crucifixes, Nathan Orchard's signature move, The Dead Orchard and Marcelo Garcia's arm drag.

programme.title: BJJ Trickster Episode 8
programme.desc: This Episode breaks down the double buggy choke from 10pQ 19, Geo Martinez's twister, Genki Sudo's flying triangle, and Tarik Hopstock's Tarikoplata.

programme.title: BJJ Trickster Episode 9
programme.desc: This episode breaks down Keenan Cornelius' Reverse Omoplata, Craig Jones' Inside Sankaku, Lachlan Giles' heel hook attacks and Grace “The Silent Assassin” Gundrum.

programme.title: Black Sheep Boxing with Zack Moore - 10pATX
programme.desc: After struggling with addiction himself, Jeff Meadows opened Black Sheep Boxing along with his friend Sky Wood with the purpose of giving recovering addicts an opportunity to turn their lives around. Join 10th Planet ATX's Zack Moore as he visits Black Sheep Boxing to learn the art of boxing.

programme.title: 10 Round Tuesday - Kemoy Anderson
programme.desc: Kemoy Anderson tries to survive 10 hard sparring rounds at 10th Planet Austin, Texas.

programme.title: Not the Bmac Show Episode 5 - Alabama to Los Angeles
programme.desc: Brandon takes some of his students and training partners out to Los Angeles for a 10 day training trip at 10th Planet Jiu Jitsu HQ with his coach and mentor, Eddie Bravo.

programme.title: BJJ Trickster Episode 6
programme.desc: This Episode features technique breakdowns of Ryan Hall, Kron Gracie, Jeremiah Vance, Cora Sek, and Jon 'Thor' Blank.

programme.title: CPI - Sean O'Malley Recovers with Stem Cells
programme.desc: Anthony Kadel and Michael Plaster go to The Cellular Performance Institute in Tijuana, Mexico to cover the UFC's #1 ranked Bantamweight, "Suga" Sean O'Malley and his Coach Tim Welch. Spend a day with Sean and Tim as they embark on the road to recovery at the premier stem cell hospital. Presented by The Grappling Network.

programme.title: Stuart Cooper Athlete Profile - Rodolfo Vieira
programme.desc: Stuart Cooper captures footage of Rodolfo Vieira's training camp for ADCC 2015 leading up to a match with Adam Sachnoff. Rodolfo Vieira also teaches a deep half to x-guard sweep.

programme.title: Armbars with Brandon Mccaghren
programme.desc: Brandon Mccaghren covers details on attacking, finishing and escaping armbars.

programme.title: Jeremiah Vance - Life Journey
programme.desc: Jeremiah Vance teaches class and discusses his life journey throughout jiu jitsu to opening up his 10th Planet Jiu Jitsu school in Santa Barbara. Plus, Jeremiah returns to the skatepark after years of being off the board.

programme.title: Ultimate Mat Warriors 4 - Fly Weights
programme.desc: 16 Man Flyweight Tournament, No Points, Submission-Only Grappling. Hosted by 10th Planet San Diego head Black Belt, Boogeyman Richie Martinez.

programme.title: Mastering The System 214- Top Half Passing with Danny Gutierrez
programme.desc: MTS 214- Top Half Passing with Danny Gutierrez

programme.title: 10pATX Camper Stranglers
programme.desc: In this 10th Planet ATX episode, meet Jon Nelson Griffith and Crystal Grace- Jiu Jitsu practitioners that have embraced “Camper Life” and are living out their dreams of traveling across the USA and doing what they love most. Living out the back of a camper can be difficult for most but this 10th Planet couple and their dogs have found their own way. What sacrifices would you make to reach your goals? Comment Below. Follow us on: Website: https://live.thegrapplingnetwork.com/ Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/thegrapplingnetwork/ TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@thegrapplingnetwork

programme.title: MTS 216- Quintet 4 Training
programme.desc: MTS 216- Quintet 4 Training

programme.title: 10pATX Radio with Quentin Rosezweig
programme.desc: Check out this episode of 10th Planet Austin podcast featuring Onnit Invitational 10's 205-pound Champion, Quentin Rosenzweig and host Zack Moore. Preparing for King of the Mat Grappling, Quentin came to 10PATX for a week long training camp. The guys talk about Absolutes Tournaments, Quentin snaps a dudes leg in front of his kid, workout schedules and routines, discuss the next no-gi Jiu Jitsu hotbed in the US and so much more. Follow us on: Website: https://live.thegrapplingnetwork.com/ Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/thegrapplingnetwork/ TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@thegrapplingnetwork

programme.title: BJJ Analysis with Matt Skaff and Brandon Mccaghren
programme.desc: 10th Planet Jiu Jitsu Black belt Brandon McCaghren rolls with his students. Meanwhile BJJ black belt Matt Skaff commentates on each roll and discusses the difference between a white belt's and a black belt's decision making.

programme.title: Tiger Muay Thai Try Outs- Part 1
programme.desc: Watch the amazing try outs being held at Tiger Muay Thai in Thailand in 2016. MMA coaches Roger Huerta and Brian Ebersole take us through the 2016 trials and award a select few full time scholarships and an opportunity to make it big in combat sports.

programme.title: Tiger Muay Thai Try Outs Part 2
programme.desc: Watch the amazing try outs being held at Tiger Muay Thai in Thailand in 2016. MMA coaches Roger Huerta and Brian Ebersole take us through the 2016 trials and award a select few full time scholarships and an opportunity to make it big in combat sports.

programme.title: Finishers 13 - The Absolutes
programme.desc: A sub only Jiu-Jitsu tournament hosted at 10th Planet Bethlehem.

programme.title: Mat Made - Nashville
programme.desc: Kenny visits Liberdade Jiu Jitsu in Nashville, TN with special guest and UFC veteran Din Thomas. See who wins the hot chicken challenge as they gulp beer down, tell Heather’s emotional redemption story, and ride mechanical bulls at the Wild Beaver Saloon.

programme.title: Inside Superyachts - Episode 5
programme.desc: Arguably, a superyacht is the most glamorous holiday you can take. Burgess yachts, the largest yacht broker in the world, talks to us about the process of owning and/or chartering your very own yacht.We take a look at just how yachts are marketed and meet with Australian Shipbuilders Silver Yachts, who achieved the amazing feat of getting a Mercedes car onto their Yacht Silver Fast for one of the most epic yachts commercials ever.For those wanting more than a charter, but don’t want to own a boat outright, we introduce them to MAHA Yachts, a brand new concept bridging the gap between Charter and Sales – a unique collaboration with the world leading hotelier Adrian Zecha from Aman Hotels and Feadship.We sign off with one last adventure underwater, exploring the sea with Deep Flight and Rainbow Fish, interviewing Dr. Xin Wu who is helping to pioneer deep water tourism.

programme.title: Inside Superyachts - Episode 6
programme.desc: In the latest episode of Inside Superyachts we interview Ken Freivokh, designer of some of the world’s most iconic yachts and concepts ever. Besides talking to the genius behind some of the best yacht masterpieces we meet with Thirty C leading CGI concept designers.Lastly, we know that no yacht would be complete without a vessel to get you to and from shore. Pascoe Tenders open their doors to us to have a look inside these space-aged, hyperluxurious tenders.

programme.title: Jet RAID - Spain
programme.desc: It's summer and the spirits are high in the second round of the Jet Raid 2019 in Spain. After visiting Greece, the series are going to La Manga, not far from Murcia. We are expecting the best action from the 25 riders that continue in the race: Jean-Bruno Pastorello is the favourite as he won in Greece, but we also have some other serious challengers like Alain Martin, David Chassier or Sébastien Biondi.

programme.title: H2O Racing: F1H2O World Championship - Episode 7 - GP of Zhengzhou - China
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 5
programme.desc: Hello and welcome to the fifth episode of Sailing to Tokyo 2020! We continue with more sailing action from the current fastest Olympic sailing classes, in Lake Attersee, Austria for the 2020 Forward WIP 49er, 49er FX & Nacra 17 European Championships. After many cancellations due to the Covid pandemic this event was the most important for these Olympic classes in 2020.Get on board with us as we go Sailing to Tokyo!

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 6
programme.desc: To end the season we focus on one class that will be introduced for Paris 2024. Kiteboarding is set to make its summer Olympic debut in Marseille after being approved as two of the then sailing events on the programme. We will also head to Italy's Genoa to focus on the L30 class, which is a candidate to become an Olympic class in Paris 2024. In this majestic Italian city, the 2020 EUROSAF Mixed Offshore European Championships took place with some of the most legendary sailors participating. Let's get going!

programme.title: Clipper: The Race Of Their Lives - Episode 6
programme.desc: Coming up we are in the US coast, where the crews take on the Pacific from Seattle down to Panama; the fleet transits through one of the modern wonders of the world - the Panama Canal; and finally a testing shorter race through the Caribbean up to the big apple, as the teams converge on New York.

programme.title: Reaching Reality - Episode 3 - Freedom
programme.desc: Deeper south into the Baja Peninsula, the weather has calm and sunny days are more common. As we open the episode with the boat breaking free from being trapped by an anchor locked in the reef, there is a new sense of freedom. On the horizon are rare and never-before seen islands with beached seals, isolated lighthouse keepers, and massive salt mines. As they discover the new and uncharted, word comes in that surf is coming and now the race is on to get the best location to capture the incoming waves.

programme.title: Reaching Reality - Episode 4 - Discovery
programme.desc: Deep into the empty desert of Mexico’s Baja Peninsula, the three are now in pursuit of a storm swell and predictions of surf. As the head towards what’s to be an iconic moment in the trip the stop off in Tortuga Bay and have a peculiar discovery of fossilized shark’s teeth deep in the heart of this cake yellow desert. Charging south on the heals of incoming surf they land in the midst of reach surf culture and smack in the middle of society. Now after over a month in isolation the three wrestle with the experience while chasing after the best waves of the trip.

programme.title: Rediscover North America
programme.desc: Six friends decide to cross 12 states on their canoe, embarking on the adventure of a lifetime. From the Gulf of Mexico to the Arctic Ocean, they battled against the current on the Mighty Mississippi, weathered ice and snow, crossed massive lakes, dodged shifting forest fires and shot challenging whitewater, all in a blasting total of 5200 miles. After eight long months, the expedition is ending, but with only 3 canoes, limited provisions and each other’s company along the way, will they be able to make it in one piece? Find it out on Nautical Channel. Awards: Best Adventure Travel Film – Reel Paddling Film Festival 2017. Winner Best Adventure Film – Waterwalker Film Festival 2017. Winner Canoe and Kayak Magazine’s 2016 Expedition of the Year Award.

programme.title: IQFOiL International Games - Cádiz
programme.desc: More than 150 athletes from 18 different countries competed in Cadiz for one of the most coveted titles of this class: the second stop of the International Circuit of the IQ Foil class. After the meeting in Lanzarote, some of the best windsurfers in the world meet again in Cadiz to compete in the International Games IQ Foil Cadiz. Enjoy the competition in Cadiz!

programme.title: Rolex World Sailing Awards - Episode 1
programme.desc: 2021 has marked a great year in the nautical world. With the Olympics, America's Cup and Vendee Globe, it is great sailing is back and strong. Let's look back on the past year and find out who of this year's nominees will become World Sailor of the Year as well as what sustainable project has been received the World Sailing 11th Hour Racing Sustainability Award.

programme.title: PRADA Cup - Final Week 2
programme.desc: We are coming to an end in this Prada Cup. So far, Luna Rossa Prada Pirelli has been winning the 2021 PRADA's Cup Final, however, every sailing enthusiast knows winds can quickly change any moment. Will INEOS Team UK take advantage of the situation? Or is this already a clear victory for Luna Rossa Prada Pirelli? Find out now, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: International Surfing Association World Championship - World Adaptive Surfing Championship
programme.desc: This year’s anticipated 2017 ISA World Adaptive Surfing Championship will be held in sunny San Diego in the renown La Jolla neighborhood. The physically challenged surfers participate in teams of up to eight members, and represent their home countries as they race through the waters. With various events and a large following, the Championship is a fun and unique experience; both for the surfers and its spectators.

programme.title: Alacati Windsurf Mecca
programme.desc: Alacati is a town on Turkey’s Cesme Peninsula and for many a Windsurf Mecca. The town is famous for its constant winds and drives the attention of people who like practicing wind sports such as Windsurfing, Kitesurfing, SUP and many more. For years now, the small town is experiencing the impact of windsurfing in their economy, society and lifestyle as it attracts the attention of people worldwide that prefer the Turkish coast to practice water sports.Experience the Alacati Windsurf Mecca that will be sure to blow your mind on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 1 - SailGP
programme.desc: Rolex Spirit of Yachting 2022 has started with a big bang: we are in the Australia Sail Grand Prix about to live the magic of the end of Season 2 in SailGP. Crews fight for the first spot in their flying catamarans, reaching speeds of up to 100 km/h. A single mistake means staying out of competition, and with 1 million euros at stake, everyone wants to give their all.

From the Gulf of Mexico to the Arctic Ocean, they battled against the current on the Mighty Mississippi, weathered ice and snow, crossed massive lakes, dodged shifting forest fires and shot challenging whitewater, all in a blasting total of 5200 miles. After eight long months, the expedition is ending, but with only 3 canoes, limited provisions and each other’s company along the way, will they be able to make it in one piece? Find it out on Nautical Channel. Awards: Best Adventure Travel Film – Reel Paddling Film Festival 2017. Winner Best Adventure Film – Waterwalker Film Festival 2017. Winner Canoe and Kayak Magazine’s 2016 Expedition of the Year Award.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 9
programme.desc: Welcome back sailors! Today we are indulging in the most fragrant gardens of the islands of Cres and Losinj where the beauty of nature is next level. These islands are also known as the favourite place for many boaters who like to enjoy beautiful beaches and top restaurants. Let's dive in!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 10
programme.desc: In this episode we are in the Opatija Riviera - the jewel box of the Northern Adriatic. With its enchanting architecture and romantic seaside promenades, it instantly takes us back to glorious summer days of the historical elite and royals. Now, let us take you here in Sail-Ho Croatia!

programme.title: Discovering Rhodes - Part 1
programme.desc: In this episode we will visit the old town and the palace of the grand master, before we refresh ourselves in the Kallithea Springs, and discover why Rhodes is considered as the sailing Mecca of the Dodecanese. We’ll take a trip to the beautiful Stegna beach to dive in the immaculate crystal blue waters, before venturing out on a SUP, a stand-up paddle board, to experience the unique and ever-growing practice of SUP Yoga. Finally, we’ll visit Panagia Tsambika, a hilltop monastery considered by some to be miracle-working.

programme.title: Discovering Rhodes - Part 2
programme.desc: In this second episode, we will visit the historic and picturesque Mandraki Harbour before exploring the natural attractions of Butterfly Valley and Seven Springs. Rhodes is often known as the paradise island for windsurfers, so we will not miss the chance to see how it feels to be on a board out on the open water. Finally, we will visit the must-see archaeological sites that aren’t to be missed before leaving the island, the town and the Acropolis of Lindos.

programme.title: Un día en...Salón Internacional Náutico de Barcelona - Salón Internacional Barcelona - Ep3
programme.desc: We invite you to discover and remember the best moments in "A day at the Barcelona International Boat Show".During the 4 days of the exhibition, you can discover more than 275 international exhibitors and almost 700 boats on the water, and many more boats at the show.

programme.title: Un día en...Salón Internacional Náutico de Barcelona - Salón Internacional Barcelona - Ep4

programme.title: International Surfing Association World Championship - World Adaptive Surfing Championship
programme.desc: This year’s anticipated 2017 ISA World Adaptive Surfing Championship will be held in sunny San Diego in the renown La Jolla neighborhood. The physically challenged surfers participate in teams of up to eight members, and represent their home countries as they race through the waters. With various events and a large following, the Championship is a fun and unique experience; both for the surfers and its spectators.

programme.title: Alacati Windsurf Mecca
programme.desc: Alacati is a town on Turkey’s Cesme Peninsula and for many a Windsurf Mecca. The town is famous for its constant winds and drives the attention of people who like practicing wind sports such as Windsurfing, Kitesurfing, SUP and many more. For years now, the small town is experiencing the impact of windsurfing in their economy, society and lifestyle as it attracts the attention of people worldwide that prefer the Turkish coast to practice water sports.Experience the Alacati Windsurf Mecca that will be sure to blow your mind on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Clipper: The Race Of Their Lives - Episode 6
programme.desc: Coming up we are in the US coast, where the crews take on the Pacific from Seattle down to Panama; the fleet transits through one of the modern wonders of the world - the Panama Canal; and finally a testing shorter race through the Caribbean up to the big apple, as the teams converge on New York.

programme.title: Rediscover North America
programme.desc: Six friends decide to cross 12 states on their canoe, embarking on the adventure of a lifetime. From the Gulf of Mexico to the Arctic Ocean, they battled against the current on the Mighty Mississippi, weathered ice and snow, crossed massive lakes, dodged shifting forest fires and shot challenging whitewater, all in a blasting total of 5200 miles. After eight long months, the expedition is ending, but with only 3 canoes, limited provisions and each other’s company along the way, will they be able to make it in one piece? Find it out on Nautical Channel. Awards: Best Adventure Travel Film – Reel Paddling Film Festival 2017. Winner Best Adventure Film – Waterwalker Film Festival 2017. Winner Canoe and Kayak Magazine’s 2016 Expedition of the Year Award.

programme.title: Jet RAID - Spain
programme.desc: It's summer and the spirits are high in the second round of the Jet Raid 2019 in Spain. After visiting Greece, the series are going to La Manga, not far from Murcia. We are expecting the best action from the 25 riders that continue in the race: Jean-Bruno Pastorello is the favourite as he won in Greece, but we also have some other serious challengers like Alain Martin, David Chassier or Sébastien Biondi.

programme.title: Hempel World Cup Series - Palma de Mallorca
programme.desc: Welcome to the 51st Trofeo Princesa Sofía regatta in Palma de Mallorca! More than a thousand of accomplished sailing athletes compete in the first Hempel World Cup Series regatta of the new Olympic cycle. As the start of the European racing season, a great sense of urgency and enthusiasm can be felt among competitors, and as a vital event, we are eager to see how their training has gone over the winter.

programme.title: Hempel World Cup Series - Medemblik
programme.desc: The Hempel Sailing World Cup Series is back. The 2021 season takes place in Medemblik, The Netherlands, during the famous Allianz Regatta. This is the first Hempel Cup Series since the outbreak of the COVID-19 virus, and sailors are excited.A grand total of 350 sailors from 47 different countries are participating across eight Olympic classes. Watch the best moments of the competition at The Netherlands.

programme.title: Bass By Kayak
programme.desc: Bass by Kayak follows a small expedition party formed by four adventurers crossing from the Australian mainland to Tasmania in sea kayaks. With a 300 km separation, a bare four hundred people have made the crossing of the Bass Strait in the modern era. Before then, Aboriginal Australians sailed in their canoes the shocking distance during the last ice age.This adventure makes strategic stops on the islands along the way; however, it is one of the toughest and deadliest journeys in the world. Adventure filmmaker Beau Miles narrates the expedition as the first ever feature film of the crossing via sea kayaks.The travellers will experience chafe, storms, bad cooking and an emerging mate-ship between men that barely know each other.Watch it now with Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Cannes Yachting Festival - Episode 1
programme.desc: The glamorous city of Cannes hosts the luxury Yachting Festival par excellence for the 40th time this year and a new Luxury Gallery has been opened in the Palais de Festivals to celebrate this landmark anniversary. Breathe in the boat show’s opulence and learn about the latest trends in the yachting world!

programme.title: Cannes Yachting Festival - Episode 1
programme.desc: Since 1977, the Cannes Yachting Festival takes place every September in elegant, luxurious surroundings in the sparkling bay of Cannes. We are ready for the 2018 edition that promises the latest trends in the nautical industry. Jump on board the 2018 Cannes Yachting Festival to discover superyachts, equipment, regattas, competitions and more.

We’ll take a trip to the beautiful Stegna beach to dive in the immaculate crystal blue waters, before venturing out on a SUP, a stand-up paddle board, to experience the unique and ever-growing practice of SUP Yoga. Finally, we’ll visit Panagia Tsambika, a hilltop monastery considered by some to be miracle-working.

programme.title: Discovering Rhodes - Part 2
programme.desc: In this second episode, we will visit the historic and picturesque Mandraki Harbour before exploring the natural attractions of Butterfly Valley and Seven Springs. Rhodes is often known as the paradise island for windsurfers, so we will not miss the chance to see how it feels to be on a board out on the open water. Finally, we will visit the must-see archaeological sites that aren’t to be missed before leaving the island, the town and the Acropolis of Lindos.

programme.title: Jet RAID - Spain
programme.desc: It's summer and the spirits are high in the second round of the Jet Raid 2019 in Spain. After visiting Greece, the series are going to La Manga, not far from Murcia. We are expecting the best action from the 25 riders that continue in the race: Jean-Bruno Pastorello is the favourite as he won in Greece, but we also have some other serious challengers like Alain Martin, David Chassier or Sébastien Biondi.

programme.title: Bass By Kayak
programme.desc: Bass by Kayak follows a small expedition party formed by four adventurers crossing from the Australian mainland to Tasmania in sea kayaks. With a 300 km separation, a bare four hundred people have made the crossing of the Bass Strait in the modern era. Before then, Aboriginal Australians sailed in their canoes the shocking distance during the last ice age.This adventure makes strategic stops on the islands along the way; however, it is one of the toughest and deadliest journeys in the world. Adventure filmmaker Beau Miles narrates the expedition as the first ever feature film of the crossing via sea kayaks.The travellers will experience chafe, storms, bad cooking and an emerging mate-ship between men that barely know each other.Watch it now with Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Clipper: The Race Of Their Lives - Episode 6
programme.desc: Coming up we are in the US coast, where the crews take on the Pacific from Seattle down to Panama; the fleet transits through one of the modern wonders of the world - the Panama Canal; and finally a testing shorter race through the Caribbean up to the big apple, as the teams converge on New York.

programme.title: Cape Verdean Kite Crossing
programme.desc: Mitu Monteiro, a Cape Verdean kitesurfer and multi-time world champion, attempts the solo crossing of the twelve volcanic islands of his native archipelago, never accomplished before.Taking on more than 730km of kitesurfing, interspersed with island traverses by only man-powered means totalling approximately 200km, Mitu’s challenges lay ahead of him. With a total trajectory of nearly 1,000km and a route that had to be thought and rethought due to wind direction, shark infested waters, and distances that push this athlete to his limit, sweat will flow and his nerves will surely be put to the test.Mitu’s maverick journey across marvellous Atlantic waters and beaches, through inhospitable lunar landscapes and the lush vegetation of the volcanic islands is truly a SURFARI on a kite. Relive the whole experience on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: The Barrel
programme.desc: Since the first wave was ridden, surfers have shared stories and experiences to try to explain the wonders inside the waves they ride.Professional and amateur surfers, photographers and videographers around the world have the possibility to display their passion: Barrel surfing. This term is used by surfers to describe riding well inside the curve of a finely shaped breaking wave, for many described as magical.The Barrel is all about surfer’s skills, creativity and love for adventure as they look for the best waves for tube riding. Get inside the barrel of the wave, with Nautical Channel.

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 5
programme.desc: Built by one of the oldest boat yards, the Baglietto MV 19 is a classic yet modern boat. We will try it out first before boarding the Ranieri 220SH and trying on the water the Solaris 47, an evolution of the 58 and the 50 with features for a reduced crew. Let's jump onboard!

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 6
programme.desc: In today's episode of The Boat Show we start in Greece to test a boat built by BSK Marine, the BSK Marine Skipper 4X 90. Then, we jump on board the Solaris 42 a boat designed by Soto Acebal. Finally, we try on the water the Capelli 50, a boat with almost 15 meters long and powered by four 425 horsepower outboards.

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 1 Season Preview
programme.desc: Welcome to the 25th season of the UIM ABP Aquabike World Championship. The world's best jetski racers are once again looking for the UIM ABP World title in six categories: the Ski Division GP1, the Ski Ladies GP1, the Freestyle, the Runabout GP1 as well as the Ski GP Junior 3.3 and 3.2.They will prove their skills across different Grand Prixes around the world. The rider who gets the most points throughout the season will be crowned world champion.Get to know what to expect from this year's edition in this season preview.
