programme.title: Clipper: The Race Of Their Lives - Episode 7
programme.desc: After nearly a year of exciting sailing, the biennial Clipper Race is approaching its finale: the North Atlantic provides a tense final ocean crossing, with one team experiencing a major set back; we meet a crew member whose life has truly changed thanks to the race while the others reflect on this extraordinary experience. Also, there's an spectacular finish with the overall results going down to the wire.

programme.title: Reaching Reality - Episode 5 - Return
programme.desc: After nearly two months at sea, which now seems like lifetimes compounded by the suffering and challenge of the passage. The three are closing out their trip home and saving the best for last. Shocked by what seems to be death island, the three uncover shark hunters and in their last village before departure battle to resupply with the essentials of gas and water with the last pennies on the boat. Meanwhile the struggles of our filmmaker’s journey return along with the fear of going back to all that was left behind.

programme.title: Barcolana 50
programme.desc: For all sea and sailing lovers and those who would never miss this one-of-a-kind show, the place is always the same every year: Trieste. Founded in 1969 thanks to the initiative of the yacht club Società Velica di Barcola e Grignano, the Barcolana competition has won its worldwide renown.This year’s 50th edition will be packed with surprises: more than 400 offshore and onshore activities, the opportunity to admire the vessel Nave Vespucci, the Barcolana 50 special postage stamp, and the Frecce Tricolori airshow just a few minutes before the start of the race. Stunningly huge yachts and sailboats steered by sailing enthusiasts will compete in the Regatta to mark this special edition of Barcolana 50.Follow this year’s competition of Barcolana 50: the international regatta that has won the Guinness World Record for the greatest sailing race.

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 1 Season Preview
programme.desc: Welcome to the 25th season of the UIM ABP Aquabike World Championship. The world's best jetski racers are once again looking for the UIM ABP World title in six categories: the Ski Division GP1, the Ski Ladies GP1, the Freestyle, the Runabout GP1 as well as the Ski GP Junior 3.3 and 3.2.They will prove their skills across different Grand Prixes around the world. The rider who gets the most points throughout the season will be crowned world champion.Get to know what to expect from this year's edition in this season preview.

programme.title: Under the Hull - Under the Hull
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Bass By Kayak
programme.desc: Bass by Kayak follows a small expedition party formed by four adventurers crossing from the Australian mainland to Tasmania in sea kayaks. With a 300 km separation, a bare four hundred people have made the crossing of the Bass Strait in the modern era. Before then, Aboriginal Australians sailed in their canoes the shocking distance during the last ice age.This adventure makes strategic stops on the islands along the way; however, it is one of the toughest and deadliest journeys in the world. Adventure filmmaker Beau Miles narrates the expedition as the first ever feature film of the crossing via sea kayaks.The travellers will experience chafe, storms, bad cooking and an emerging mate-ship between men that barely know each other.Watch it now with Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Sailing to the Games - Episode 5
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Sailing to the Games - Episode 6
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Discovering Rhodes - Part 1
programme.desc: In this episode we will visit the old town and the palace of the grand master, before we refresh ourselves in the Kallithea Springs, and discover why Rhodes is considered as the sailing Mecca of the Dodecanese. We’ll take a trip to the beautiful Stegna beach to dive in the immaculate crystal blue waters, before venturing out on a SUP, a stand-up paddle board, to experience the unique and ever-growing practice of SUP Yoga. Finally, we’ll visit Panagia Tsambika, a hilltop monastery considered by some to be miracle-working.

programme.title: Discovering Rhodes - Part 2
programme.desc: In this second episode, we will visit the historic and picturesque Mandraki Harbour before exploring the natural attractions of Butterfly Valley and Seven Springs. Rhodes is often known as the paradise island for windsurfers, so we will not miss the chance to see how it feels to be on a board out on the open water. Finally, we will visit the must-see archaeological sites that aren’t to be missed before leaving the island, the town and the Acropolis of Lindos.

programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Clipper: The Race Of Their Lives - Episode 7
programme.desc: After nearly a year of exciting sailing, the biennial Clipper Race is approaching its finale: the North Atlantic provides a tense final ocean crossing, with one team experiencing a major set back; we meet a crew member whose life has truly changed thanks to the race while the others reflect on this extraordinary experience. Also, there's an spectacular finish with the overall results going down to the wire.

programme.title: The Barrel
programme.desc: Since the first wave was ridden, surfers have shared stories and experiences to try to explain the wonders inside the waves they ride.Professional and amateur surfers, photographers and videographers around the world have the possibility to display their passion: Barrel surfing. This term is used by surfers to describe riding well inside the curve of a finely shaped breaking wave, for many described as magical.The Barrel is all about surfer’s skills, creativity and love for adventure as they look for the best waves for tube riding. Get inside the barrel of the wave, with Nautical Channel.

programme.desc: The Rolex TP52 World Championship is considered the crown of monohull grand prix competition. programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 11
programme.desc: In this last episode of the season, we visit Zagreb, the capital of the country and one of the most popular destinations in Croatia. As a city with a rich history and an abundance of cultural events, it is the perfect place to include at the end of our Croatian adventure. Let's check it out!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 1
programme.desc: Hello Sailors! It’s such a great pleasure to welcome you to the new season of Sail-ho Croatia. We’re setting off on yet another incredible journey sailing the Adriatic starting from the lush and picturesque Neretva valley and the town of Ploče. Stay tuned and enjoy the ride!

programme.title: Croatia Yacht Show & International Charter Expo - Highlight
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Dis.Traction
programme.desc: The two-time world wave sailing champion Marcilio Browne, originally from Brazil, has decided to make the Hawaiian island of Maui his permanent home to pursue his passion. Dis.Traction follows Marcilio during his first training sessions leading into to the decisive season’s final contest where the greatest windsurfers compete for the ultimate prize.Following the end of contest season, Marcilio and fellow wave sailing champion Morgan Noireaux take to the mountains, or rather to the volcano for some alternative action. As the island is exposed to heavy ground swells from many directions, Marcilio and his friends are always looking for ideal spots to practice.Dis.Traction is a rollercoaster ride of action and an authentic insight into the perspective of a seasoned professional windsurfer. Shot on location it features the breathtaking beauty of the Hawaiian Island of Maui and showcases appearances of some of the sport’s greatest athletes.

programme.title: Hempel World Cup Series - Netherlands
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Why Not Whitewater?
programme.desc: Welcome to Dimaro, the Rafting Center Val di Sole. Our story begins in 1982 when a group of adventurers decided to make history by being the first humans to raft down the River Noce. Not only they managed to go down the river against all odds, but they also fell in love with its beautiful landscapes and decided to share it with the rest of the world.Why Not Whitewater? takes us on a journey to the north of Italy to explore the valleys and rivers in the most adventurous ways. From canoening to kayaking and from rafting to hydrospeed, we are set to live an odyssey filled with adrenaline and fun that will leave you wondeing why not white water this summer!

programme.title: The Barrel
programme.desc: Since the first wave was ridden, surfers have shared stories and experiences to try to explain the wonders inside the waves they ride.Professional and amateur surfers, photographers and videographers around the world have the possibility to display their passion: Barrel surfing. This term is used by surfers to describe riding well inside the curve of a finely shaped breaking wave, for many described as magical.The Barrel is all about surfer’s skills, creativity and love for adventure as they look for the best waves for tube riding. Get inside the barrel of the wave, with Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Bass By Kayak
programme.desc: Bass by Kayak follows a small expedition party formed by four adventurers crossing from the Australian mainland to Tasmania in sea kayaks. With a 300 km separation, a bare four hundred people have made the crossing of the Bass Strait in the modern era. Before then, Aboriginal Australians sailed in their canoes the shocking distance during the last ice age.This adventure makes strategic stops on the islands along the way; however, it is one of the toughest and deadliest journeys in the world. Adventure filmmaker Beau Miles narrates the expedition as the first ever feature film of the crossing via sea kayaks.The travellers will experience chafe, storms, bad cooking and an emerging mate-ship between men that barely know each other.Watch it now with Nautical Channel.

programme.desc: Welcome to the 25th season of the UIM ABP Aquabike World Championship. The world's best jetski racers are once again looking for the UIM ABP World title in six categories: the Ski Division GP1, the Ski Ladies GP1, the Freestyle, the Runabout GP1 as well as the Ski GP Junior 3.3 and 3.2.They will prove their skills across different Grand Prixes around the world. The rider who gets the most points throughout the season will be crowned world champion.Get to know what to expect from this year's edition in this season preview.

programme.title: Dis.Traction
programme.desc: The two-time world wave sailing champion Marcilio Browne, originally from Brazil, has decided to make the Hawaiian island of Maui his permanent home to pursue his passion. Dis.Traction follows Marcilio during his first training sessions leading into to the decisive season’s final contest where the greatest windsurfers compete for the ultimate prize.Following the end of contest season, Marcilio and fellow wave sailing champion Morgan Noireaux take to the mountains, or rather to the volcano for some alternative action. As the island is exposed to heavy ground swells from many directions, Marcilio and his friends are always looking for ideal spots to practice.Dis.Traction is a rollercoaster ride of action and an authentic insight into the perspective of a seasoned professional windsurfer. Shot on location it features the breathtaking beauty of the Hawaiian Island of Maui and showcases appearances of some of the sport’s greatest athletes.

programme.title: Clipper: The Race Of Their Lives - Episode 7
programme.desc: After nearly a year of exciting sailing, the biennial Clipper Race is approaching its finale: the North Atlantic provides a tense final ocean crossing, with one team experiencing a major set back; we meet a crew member whose life has truly changed thanks to the race while the others reflect on this extraordinary experience. Also, there's an spectacular finish with the overall results going down to the wire.

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 1
programme.desc: We are getting ready for the AC35 and we want to look deeper on this event. We will dive into the Director's Cut before taking a quick look at the Challengers that will face off in the Louis Vuitton Cup. Then, we have a word with the defender team, Oracle Team USA before talking with challenger Franck Cammas and Groupama Team France.

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 2
programme.desc: Welcome to another episode of America's Cup Insight. Today, we are at the heart of the British challenge inside the Land Rover B.A.R. We will discover more about the team, the players and the big family behind the boat. Also, find out how boundaries are changing the game and find out more about the wings of change.Plunge into the action with AC35 Insight.

programme.title: Meet me in Madeira
programme.desc: Welcome to Madeira!The main island of the volcanic Portuguese archipelago is home to a wide sea life and rich ecosystem. With its subtropical climate, Madeira is a chosen destination for nautical sports enthusiasts that enjoy the paradisiac conditions of the island.From diving to surfing, sailing to coasteering, Madeira offers a wide variety of nautical activities for the avid sportsmen or just the visiting tourist. Join Andi van Zyl on an experience that only this Portuguese archipelago has to offer, from stand-up paddling to wine tasting.Discover the secrets of Madeira and get to know the heart-warming locals of the beautiful archipelago in an exclusive show on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Surf's Cooking
programme.desc: Matt Bromley is a renowned big wave surfer. Ollie Swart is a chef. Together, the two best friends will embark on an adventure down Cape Town’s coastline. Foraging for food and looking for the best surf spots, Surf’s Cooking brings gastronomy to the surfing world with this beautiful friendship.Both friends will have to quickly adapt and learn about each other. For Matt Bromley, learning about foraging for food and how to cook it properly will become challenging, and Ollie Swart will have to surf past the obstacles in this nautical sport. Will they be ready to share their passion between them?Watch their adventure in South Africa on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: SXM Best Weekend
programme.desc: Ready for the best weekend of your lives? The SXM Best Weekend is one of the most anticipated Caribbean summer events of the year. A local group of young brothers and musicians called “The Red Eye Crew” decided to revolutionize the party scenario in these paradisiac islands. That is why they brought a party wave onto St. Maarten.Follow their crazy adventure as they organize this explosive event and share their inspiring story on how they came up with this idea and what drives them. A fun journey for party lovers, SXM Best Weekend will have you put your hands up and enjoy the queens of Caribbean music with blasting performances from Haitian rapper Wyclef Jean.Party your way around the Caribbean rhythm, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Surfer's Blood
programme.desc: Renowned surf photographer and filmmaker Patrick Trefz explores the essence of the sport he loves by profiling those who inspire him. Surfers' Blood tells the universal story of true individuals that share deep bloodlines connected to the sea.From wooden fishing boats in the Basque Country coast with oar and surfboard shaper Patxi Oliden to the metropolis of San Francisco and the eccentric computer shapes of Apple fame designer Thomas Meyerhoffer, unique people unite by a deep connection to the sea.Watch it on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 7
programme.desc: The first Chris Craft boat was built by Christopher Colombus Smith in 1874, and since the brand has left its mark on many. Now we have the chance to try the Capri 27, built with modern materials but the same care and precision as the old master carpenters. Then, we will discover Eleva Yachts in the Marina degli Aregai before getting onboard the Benetti 125 Rolls Royce Azipull. Come join us!

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 8
programme.desc: In today's episode of The Boat Show we get on board a really special superyacht. Built by Benetti and propulsed by Rolls Royce we are on board the Benetti 125 Fast. Then, we get on board the Azimut S6 to remember the sport factor in a luxury yacht. Come join us on board!

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 1 Season Preview
programme.desc: Welcome to the 25th season of the UIM ABP Aquabike World Championship. The world's best jetski racers are once again looking for the UIM ABP World title in six categories: the Ski Division GP1, the Ski Ladies GP1, the Freestyle, the Runabout GP1 as well as the Ski GP Junior 3.3 and 3.2.They will prove their skills across different Grand Prixes around the world. The rider who gets the most points throughout the season will be crowned world champion.Get to know what to expect from this year's edition in this season preview.

programme.title: Clipper: The Race Of Their Lives - Episode 7
programme.desc: After nearly a year of exciting sailing, the biennial Clipper Race is approaching its finale: the North Atlantic provides a tense final ocean crossing, with one team experiencing a major set back; we meet a crew member whose life has truly changed thanks to the race while the others reflect on this extraordinary experience. Also, there's an spectacular finish with the overall results going down to the wire.

programme.title: Croatia Yacht Show & International Charter Expo - Highlight
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Dis.Traction
programme.desc: The two-time world wave sailing champion Marcilio Browne, originally from Brazil, has decided to make the Hawaiian island of Maui his permanent home to pursue his passion. Dis.Traction follows Marcilio during his first training sessions leading into to the decisive season’s final contest where the greatest windsurfers compete for the ultimate prize.Following the end of contest season, Marcilio and fellow wave sailing champion Morgan Noireaux take to the mountains, or rather to the volcano for some alternative action. As the island is exposed to heavy ground swells from many directions, Marcilio and his friends are always looking for ideal spots to practice.Dis.Traction is a rollercoaster ride of action and an authentic insight into the perspective of a seasoned professional windsurfer. Shot on location it features the breathtaking beauty of the Hawaiian Island of Maui and showcases appearances of some of the sport’s greatest athletes.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Ep.7 - Rolex Sydney Hobart Yacht Race
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Les Voiles de Saint Tropez - 20 Years Of Les Voiles De St Tropez
programme.desc: Join Nautical Channel for a full coverage of one of the most awaited nautical events in the world. We will bring you to the most exclusive events and have special insights with the best athletes and all the VIPs. We will show you what it feels like to be on board on an ultra-modern super yacht during a match race in the legendary bay of Brigitte Bardot and also take a look around inside some of the most amazing classic yachts that ever sailed.

programme.title: Surfer's Blood
programme.desc: Renowned surf photographer and filmmaker Patrick Trefz explores the essence of the sport he loves by profiling those who inspire him. Surfers' Blood tells the universal story of true individuals that share deep bloodlines connected to the sea.From wooden fishing boats in the Basque Country coast with oar and surfboard shaper Patxi Oliden to the metropolis of San Francisco and the eccentric computer shapes of Apple fame designer Thomas Meyerhoffer, unique people unite by a deep connection to the sea.Watch it on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 2 Portimao, Portugal
programme.desc: The UIM-ABP Aquabike World Championship Oﬀshore has started its new season in the European City of Sport for 2019, Portimao, Portugal. It attracts the world’s top male and female riders from around the globe who compete on cutting edge equipment, delivering a mix of fast paced racing, nail biting action and non-stop excitement. More than 70 riders from 26 countries will battle in six categories: the Ski Division GP1, the Ski Ladies GP1, the Freestyle, the Runabout GP1 as well as the Ski GP Junior 3.3 and 3.2.In this episode, we will focus on all the ski action from the Grand Prix of Portugal.

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 1
programme.desc: We are getting ready for the AC35 and we want to look deeper on this event. We will dive into the Director's Cut before taking a quick look at the Challengers that will face off in the Louis Vuitton Cup. Then, we have a word with the defender team, Oracle Team USA before talking with challenger Franck Cammas and Groupama Team France.

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 2
programme.desc: Welcome to another episode of America's Cup Insight. Today, we are at the heart of the British challenge inside the Land Rover B.A.R. We will discover more about the team, the players and the big family behind the boat. Also, find out how boundaries are changing the game and find out more about the wings of change.Plunge into the action with AC35 Insight.

Dis.Traction follows Marcilio during his first training sessions leading into to the decisive season’s final contest where the greatest windsurfers compete for the ultimate prize.Following the end of contest season, Marcilio and fellow wave sailing champion Morgan Noireaux take to the mountains, or rather to the volcano for some alternative action. As the island is exposed to heavy ground swells from many directions, Marcilio and his friends are always looking for ideal spots to practice.Dis.Traction is a rollercoaster ride of action and an authentic insight into the perspective of a seasoned professional windsurfer. Shot on location it features the breathtaking beauty of the Hawaiian Island of Maui and showcases appearances of some of the sport’s greatest athletes.

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 1
programme.desc: We are getting ready for the AC35 and we want to look deeper on this event. We will dive into the Director's Cut before taking a quick look at the Challengers that will face off in the Louis Vuitton Cup. Then, we have a word with the defender team, Oracle Team USA before talking with challenger Franck Cammas and Groupama Team France.

programme.desc: Welcome to another episode of America's Cup Insight. Today, we are at the heart of the British challenge inside the Land Rover B.A.R. We will discover more about the team, the players and the big family behind the boat. Also, find out how boundaries are changing the game and find out more about the wings of change.Plunge into the action with AC35 Insight.

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 2 Portimao, Portugal
programme.desc: The UIM-ABP Aquabike World Championship Oﬀshore has started its new season in the European City of Sport for 2019, Portimao, Portugal. It attracts the world’s top male and female riders from around the globe who compete on cutting edge equipment, delivering a mix of fast paced racing, nail biting action and non-stop excitement. More than 70 riders from 26 countries will battle in six categories: the Ski Division GP1, the Ski Ladies GP1, the Freestyle, the Runabout GP1 as well as the Ski GP Junior 3.3 and 3.2.In this episode, we will focus on all the ski action from the Grand Prix of Portugal.

programme.title: Surfer's Blood
programme.desc: Renowned surf photographer and filmmaker Patrick Trefz explores the essence of the sport he loves by profiling those who inspire him. Surfers' Blood tells the universal story of true individuals that share deep bloodlines connected to the sea.From wooden fishing boats in the Basque Country coast with oar and surfboard shaper Patxi Oliden to the metropolis of San Francisco and the eccentric computer shapes of Apple fame designer Thomas Meyerhoffer, unique people unite by a deep connection to the sea.Watch it on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 2
programme.desc: In today's episode we will be visiting one of the most beautiful spots in Croatia and unknown for many. From historic sites to fabulous new modern spots, Korčula is certainly one of my favorite places in the world. With crystal clear sea this sun-drenched oasis also has plenty of water sports on offer. Get splashed into action with us!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 3
programme.desc: Welcome to the third episode of sun-drenched Sail-Ho Croatia! We are on the beautiful island of Hvar getting a little bit tipsy, but seriously the wine here is so good and so is the food. For the ultimate refreshment we have the appetizing crystal-clear sea around us, and we cannot refuse a dip in its warm waters.

programme.title: Discovering Saint Maarten
programme.desc: One of the most captivating and curious islands of the entire Caribbean is without doubt Saint Maarten. The island is split into two nationalities while also hosting many more, becoming a hub of diverse excitement where the best of different cultures takes place. This is probably because the northern half of the island belongs to France while the southern side is part of the Kingdom of the Netherlands, something highly uncommon around the world.Experience a 12-meter sailboat race, planes flying 50 overhead on crystal blue watered beaches, long streets filled with cultural fusion and wildlife tours and an underwater helmet-diving excursion by the side of a submarine wreck in Discovering Saint Maarten.Broadcasted on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Discovering Symi
programme.desc: Welcome to the beautiful island of Symi, Greece, in the middle of the Aegean Sea. Symi is part of the Dodecanese island chain, located about forty-one kilometres northwest of Rhodes, featuring fifty-eight-point one square kilometres of mountainous terrain.In this series we will discover the beauty of Symi’s capital, Gialos, and its neighbouring district of Chorio as we learn more about the hospitable harbour of the island, a popular resting place for sailors to park up and explore.Symi is home to a long tradition of shipbuilding, handmade boats with real charm. Get to know first-hand this handiwork before visiting the historic castle and taking a ride on a traditional Grecian boat. You will see this apparently small island is filled with a vast variety of things to do, see and eat.Join us on Nautical Channel on our journey to the Aegean Sea to discover the secrets of Symi.

programme.title: Iballa - Corazón de Escamas
programme.desc: After more than two decades in the world class of sports and overcoming different personal and sporting challenges of great significance, Iballa Ruano Moreno achieved in 2018 an historical landmark unprecedented in professional sports: winning the world championships in the same year the PWA World Circuit of Windsurf and the APP World Tour of Stand Up Paddle. This milestone never before achieved by an active athlete, highlights the level of dedication and improvement that the Moreno Twins and specifically Iballa Ruano, have been successfully reaping for so many years. However, the journey wasn’t easy. Corazón de Escamas is a short biographical documentary told in the first person and that shows the most intimate part of its history and is dedicated with great affection to the Ruano Moreno family. Dive into the world of this Canarian athlete and find out her inspiring story.

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 3
programme.desc: Out of the fray and sitting pretty after winning the Round Robin qualifiers, Oracle Team USA now waits for the winner. Following the script, France says goodbye while the fabulous four New Zealand, Sweden, Great Britain and Japan take on the Louis Vuitton Challenger Playoffs. We will talk with weather guru inside the role of America's Cup meteorologists and close up at the heart of Artemis Racing, the Swedish Challenger.

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 4
programme.desc: Emirates Team New Zealand follows the script and gets the pass to take on the Defender for the 35th America's Cup Match. 100% fly-time, 40 knot match races, close scalls, close contact, a helmsmen going overboard... we will take an in depth look at safety in a modern day America's Cup. Then on exclusive: Franck Cammas encounters a rudder blade and we dive into the body gear for the AC50 crews with Thierry Fouchier.

programme.title: Maya Gabeira - Return to Nazaré
programme.desc: After a horrible crash in Nazaré that almost took her life, big wave surfer Maya Gabeira fights to overcome physical and mental obstacles and return to surf the giant waves again.Maya Gabeira, the Brazilian surfer that was close to death in 2013 in Nazaré due to big waves. She had to be rescued by lifeguards who struggled to get her out of waves that didn’t stop coming. After recovering physically and emotionally of the shock, she's ready to return to Nazaré to overcome the same obstacles that almost took her life years ago.Her determination is undeniable, as is the danger of tempting fate twice. However, once in Nazaré, will she have the strength needed to surf deathly waves?Follow her inspiring story in Maya Gabeira – Return to Nazaré.

programme.title: Surfer's Blood
programme.desc: Renowned surf photographer and filmmaker Patrick Trefz explores the essence of the sport he loves by profiling those who inspire him. Surfers' Blood tells the universal story of true individuals that share deep bloodlines connected to the sea.From wooden fishing boats in the Basque Country coast with oar and surfboard shaper Patxi Oliden to the metropolis of San Francisco and the eccentric computer shapes of Apple fame designer Thomas Meyerhoffer, unique people unite by a deep connection to the sea.Watch it on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 3
programme.desc: Out of the fray and sitting pretty after winning the Round Robin qualifiers, Oracle Team USA now waits for the winner. Following the script, France says goodbye while the fabulous four New Zealand, Sweden, Great Britain and Japan take on the Louis Vuitton Challenger Playoffs. We will talk with weather guru inside the role of America's Cup meteorologists and close up at the heart of Artemis Racing, the Swedish Challenger.

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 4
programme.desc: Emirates Team New Zealand follows the script and gets the pass to take on the Defender for the 35th America's Cup Match. 100% fly-time, 40 knot match races, close scalls, close contact, a helmsmen going overboard... we will take an in depth look at safety in a modern day America's Cup. Then on exclusive: Franck Cammas encounters a rudder blade and we dive into the body gear for the AC50 crews with Thierry Fouchier.

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 2 Portimao, Portugal
programme.desc: The UIM-ABP Aquabike World Championship Oﬀshore has started its new season in the European City of Sport for 2019, Portimao, Portugal. It attracts the world’s top male and female riders from around the globe who compete on cutting edge equipment, delivering a mix of fast paced racing, nail biting action and non-stop excitement. More than 70 riders from 26 countries will battle in six categories: the Ski Division GP1, the Ski Ladies GP1, the Freestyle, the Runabout GP1 as well as the Ski GP Junior 3.3 and 3.2.In this episode, we will focus on all the ski action from the Grand Prix of Portugal.

programme.title: Surfer's Blood
programme.desc: Renowned surf photographer and filmmaker Patrick Trefz explores the essence of the sport he loves by profiling those who inspire him. Surfers' Blood tells the universal story of true individuals that share deep bloodlines connected to the sea.From wooden fishing boats in the Basque Country coast with oar and surfboard shaper Patxi Oliden to the metropolis of San Francisco and the eccentric computer shapes of Apple fame designer Thomas Meyerhoffer, unique people unite by a deep connection to the sea.Watch it on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Discovering Saint Maarten
programme.desc: One of the most captivating and curious islands of the entire Caribbean is without doubt Saint Maarten. The island is split into two nationalities while also hosting many more, becoming a hub of diverse excitement where the best of different cultures takes place. This is probably because the northern half of the island belongs to France while the southern side is part of the Kingdom of the Netherlands, something highly uncommon around the world.Experience a 12-meter sailboat race, planes flying 50 overhead on crystal blue watered beaches, long streets filled with cultural fusion and wildlife tours and an underwater helmet-diving excursion by the side of a submarine wreck in Discovering Saint Maarten.Broadcasted on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Discovering Symi
programme.desc: Welcome to the beautiful island of Symi, Greece, in the middle of the Aegean Sea. Symi is part of the Dodecanese island chain, located about forty-one kilometres northwest of Rhodes, featuring fifty-eight-point one square kilometres of mountainous terrain.In this series we will discover the beauty of Symi’s capital, Gialos, and its neighbouring district of Chorio as we learn more about the hospitable harbour of the island, a popular resting place for sailors to park up and explore.Symi is home to a long tradition of shipbuilding, handmade boats with real charm. Get to know first-hand this handiwork before visiting the historic castle and taking a ride on a traditional Grecian boat. You will see this apparently small island is filled with a vast variety of things to do, see and eat.Join us on Nautical Channel on our journey to the Aegean Sea to discover the secrets of Symi.

programme.title: A Surfing Life: David Van Zyl
programme.desc: David Van Zyl is a young South-African surfer that is quickly gaining popularity and becoming a rising star on the pro-surfer scene. For surf connoisseurs, his name has made history in 2019 as the first International Surfer to ever win the Vans Pro competition in Hawaii. Before then, Hawaiian surfers had an undefeated upper hand that was finally overcome by this young underdog. He now faces new challenges to engrave his name in fame.Get ready to catch some South African waves with David Van Zyl and find out more about his lifestyle on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Beneath the Surface
programme.desc: Big wave surfer Andrew Cotton, a plumber and father of two from Devon, hit the headlines in 2014 when it was rumoured that he had surfed the world’s biggest wave, estimated at 80ft. In this one-off 30-minute documentary, Andrew and his team of surfers, sailors and adventurers put everything on hold as they secretly chase a wave that emerges only a handful of times each year, giving only hours of warning.Taking a boat eight miles off the coast of Ireland, the team battle the extreme cold and fierce weather conditions, whilst mapping the ocean’s swell, in order to try to catch one almighty ride. Far from home and with the days getting shorter, frustration sets in, as the window of opportunity gets smaller. With a young family at home, Andrew must balance the normality of the school run, before boarding a plane alone to face one of earth’s deadliest monsters.

programme.title: Who is Vilayta
programme.desc: WHO IS VILAYTA reveals the nature of Vilayta, one of the pioneers of big wave surfing on the Canary Islands. This short biographical documentary shares with us his deep connection with the ocean and Germán Pinelo captures this perfectly in this impressive world.This short documentary is full of unrepeatable moments. Filled with people who love what they do, that do not stop dreaming and living life how they want to. Combining passions, dreams, friendship, craziness and sweetness, Who is Vilayta deepens the character beyond the figure of the surfer. An artful motion picture that breaks myth and makes legends.

programme.title: Tidal
programme.desc: Tidal follows the journey of Lisa Beasley. After she suffered a horrible BASE jumping accident, she struggles to return to the ocean, but ends convincing herself to venture back into the water. Lisa’s journey begins with a childhood love of water and sea life. Lucky of surviving the accident, she must now face an immense recovery period that brings her closer to her mother as well as her first love: the sea.As Lisa struggles to find an exercise she can handle, she starts discovering the beauty surrounding Cape Town’s ocean. The tidal pools in particular became very meaningful to Lisa’s recovery, and she must now work to protect them from the harmful historical cleaning protocols that kill the marine life she has come to love.Watch Lisa’s inspirational transformation and realisation of the beauty of the ocean in this impactful documentary that reminds us of the importance of self-recovery and reconnection with the ocean. Available on Nautical Channel.

Lisa’s journey begins with a childhood love of water and sea life. Lucky of surviving the accident, she must now face an immense recovery period that brings her closer to her mother as well as her first love: the sea.As Lisa struggles to find an exercise she can handle, she starts discovering the beauty surrounding Cape Town’s ocean. The tidal pools in particular became very meaningful to Lisa’s recovery, and she must now work to protect them from the harmful historical cleaning protocols that kill the marine life she has come to love.Watch Lisa’s inspirational transformation and realisation of the beauty of the ocean in this impactful documentary that reminds us of the importance of self-recovery and reconnection with the ocean. Available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 3
programme.desc: Out of the fray and sitting pretty after winning the Round Robin qualifiers, Oracle Team USA now waits for the winner. Following the script, France says goodbye while the fabulous four New Zealand, Sweden, Great Britain and Japan take on the Louis Vuitton Challenger Playoffs. We will talk with weather guru inside the role of America's Cup meteorologists and close up at the heart of Artemis Racing, the Swedish Challenger.

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 4
programme.desc: Emirates Team New Zealand follows the script and gets the pass to take on the Defender for the 35th America's Cup Match. 100% fly-time, 40 knot match races, close scalls, close contact, a helmsmen going overboard... we will take an in depth look at safety in a modern day America's Cup. Then on exclusive: Franck Cammas encounters a rudder blade and we dive into the body gear for the AC50 crews with Thierry Fouchier.

programme.title: Discovering Saint Maarten
programme.desc: One of the most captivating and curious islands of the entire Caribbean is without doubt Saint Maarten. The island is split into two nationalities while also hosting many more, becoming a hub of diverse excitement where the best of different cultures takes place. This is probably because the northern half of the island belongs to France while the southern side is part of the Kingdom of the Netherlands, something highly uncommon around the world.Experience a 12-meter sailboat race, planes flying 50 overhead on crystal blue watered beaches, long streets filled with cultural fusion and wildlife tours and an underwater helmet-diving excursion by the side of a submarine wreck in Discovering Saint Maarten.Broadcasted on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Discovering Symi
programme.desc: Welcome to the beautiful island of Symi, Greece, in the middle of the Aegean Sea. Symi is part of the Dodecanese island chain, located about forty-one kilometres northwest of Rhodes, featuring fifty-eight-point one square kilometres of mountainous terrain.In this series we will discover the beauty of Symi’s capital, Gialos, and its neighbouring district of Chorio as we learn more about the hospitable harbour of the island, a popular resting place for sailors to park up and explore.Symi is home to a long tradition of shipbuilding, handmade boats with real charm. Get to know first-hand this handiwork before visiting the historic castle and taking a ride on a traditional Grecian boat. You will see this apparently small island is filled with a vast variety of things to do, see and eat.Join us on Nautical Channel on our journey to the Aegean Sea to discover the secrets of Symi.

programme.title: Who is Vilayta
programme.desc: WHO IS VILAYTA reveals the nature of Vilayta, one of the pioneers of big wave surfing on the Canary Islands. This short biographical documentary shares with us his deep connection with the ocean and Germán Pinelo captures this perfectly in this impressive world.This short documentary is full of unrepeatable moments. Filled with people who love what they do, that do not stop dreaming and living life how they want to. Combining passions, dreams, friendship, craziness and sweetness, Who is Vilayta deepens the character beyond the figure of the surfer. An artful motion picture that breaks myth and makes legends.

programme.title: What Sup - Episode 1
programme.desc: In this first episode of What SUP we meet David Brent and go paddleboarding for a chat on the water. He will talk about his experience on the stage before trying out the popular paddleboard yoga with Winny Clarke. We will hopefully learn how to relax on the water and not fall out of our boards too much!

programme.title: What Sup - Episode 2
programme.desc: Welcome to the second episode of What SUP. On today's episode, comedian Ryan Maglunob and the band the Elwins will join us in our adventures. Chris first saw Ryan perform live a few months ago, and he was amused throughout the whole set. Let's go take a paddle with Ryan before playing paddle pong and many other challenges!

programme.title: Bol D'Or: The Swiss Do It Better
programme.desc: The Bol D’Or Mirabaud is the most important inland lake regatta in the world. Taking place in Switzerland, a landlocked nation that sits on top of the sailing world with multiple successes whether in the Olympic, Offshore or in Grand Prix Racing formats, and champion of two America’s Cup victories. The race started in 1939 and it is a symbolic race that brings together the best of Switzerland’s sailing tradition.Every year they welcome mono-hulls and multihulls on Lake Geneva, starting in the city of Geneva. More than 500 boats fight each other on this 123 kilometre (66.5 nautical miles) course from Geneva to Le Bouveret and back. It is a national treasure that every summer gathers thousands of spectators to the shores of Lake Geneva and really shows how the Swiss indeed do it better.Watch the race and become one with the beauty of Switzerland’s background, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: PWA World Cup - Tiberias, Israel
programme.desc: Athletes are meeting in Tiberias, Israel, for the PWA World Cup. This first leg of this year's competition will be filled with action after 18 months of inactivity. With winds between 18 and 30 knots, it will truly be a challenge for the world's best windsurf sailors and with this uncertainty in the conditions, we can expect anything to happen in Israel. Don't miss out on the PWA World Cup 2021 in Tiberias that marks the beginning of this year's windsurfing action!

programme.title: Coruña Big Waves - Highlights - A Coruña Big Waves 2022
programme.desc: The list of surfers who have confirmed their place in this championship includes João de Macedo, Vinicios do Santos, Ian Consenza or Antonio Laureano. Enjoy the best moments of the 2022 edition!

programme.title: Transpac Yacht Race - Episode 1
programme.desc: Aloha! Honolulu, Hawaii, is ready for the 51st edition of the Transpac. 40 teams starting in San Pedro will embark in a lifetime journey across the Pacific to get to Hawaiian waters. This year we have seen some of the fastest times in this race, broken masts at the start of the race and some other serious damage incidents across the trip.Enjoy the best moments of the 2021 edition of the Transpac Yacht Race.

Then on exclusive: Franck Cammas encounters a rudder blade and we dive into the body gear for the AC50 crews with Thierry Fouchier.

programme.title: PWA World Cup - Tiberias, Israel
programme.desc: Athletes are meeting in Tiberias, Israel, for the PWA World Cup. This first leg of this year's competition will be filled with action after 18 months of inactivity. With winds between 18 and 30 knots, it will truly be a challenge for the world's best windsurf sailors and with this uncertainty in the conditions, we can expect anything to happen in Israel. Don't miss out on the PWA World Cup 2021 in Tiberias that marks the beginning of this year's windsurfing action!

programme.title: What Sup - Episode 1
programme.desc: In this first episode of What SUP we meet David Brent and go paddleboarding for a chat on the water. He will talk about his experience on the stage before trying out the popular paddleboard yoga with Winny Clarke. We will hopefully learn how to relax on the water and not fall out of our boards too much!

programme.title: What Sup - Episode 2
programme.desc: Welcome to the second episode of What SUP. On today's episode, comedian Ryan Maglunob and the band the Elwins will join us in our adventures. Chris first saw Ryan perform live a few months ago, and he was amused throughout the whole set. Let's go take a paddle with Ryan before playing paddle pong and many other challenges!

programme.title: Who is Vilayta
programme.desc: WHO IS VILAYTA reveals the nature of Vilayta, one of the pioneers of big wave surfing on the Canary Islands. This short biographical documentary shares with us his deep connection with the ocean and Germán Pinelo captures this perfectly in this impressive world.This short documentary is full of unrepeatable moments. Filled with people who love what they do, that do not stop dreaming and living life how they want to. Combining passions, dreams, friendship, craziness and sweetness, Who is Vilayta deepens the character beyond the figure of the surfer. An artful motion picture that breaks myth and makes legends.

programme.title: Tidal
programme.desc: Tidal follows the journey of Lisa Beasley. After she suffered a horrible BASE jumping accident, she struggles to return to the ocean, but ends convincing herself to venture back into the water. Lisa’s journey begins with a childhood love of water and sea life. Lucky of surviving the accident, she must now face an immense recovery period that brings her closer to her mother as well as her first love: the sea.As Lisa struggles to find an exercise she can handle, she starts discovering the beauty surrounding Cape Town’s ocean. The tidal pools in particular became very meaningful to Lisa’s recovery, and she must now work to protect them from the harmful historical cleaning protocols that kill the marine life she has come to love.Watch Lisa’s inspirational transformation and realisation of the beauty of the ocean in this impactful documentary that reminds us of the importance of self-recovery and reconnection with the ocean. Available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Discovering Saint Maarten
programme.desc: One of the most captivating and curious islands of the entire Caribbean is without doubt Saint Maarten. The island is split into two nationalities while also hosting many more, becoming a hub of diverse excitement where the best of different cultures takes place. This is probably because the northern half of the island belongs to France while the southern side is part of the Kingdom of the Netherlands, something highly uncommon around the world.Experience a 12-meter sailboat race, planes flying 50 overhead on crystal blue watered beaches, long streets filled with cultural fusion and wildlife tours and an underwater helmet-diving excursion by the side of a submarine wreck in Discovering Saint Maarten.Broadcasted on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Discovering Symi
programme.desc: Welcome to the beautiful island of Symi, Greece, in the middle of the Aegean Sea. Symi is part of the Dodecanese island chain, located about forty-one kilometres northwest of Rhodes, featuring fifty-eight-point one square kilometres of mountainous terrain.In this series we will discover the beauty of Symi’s capital, Gialos, and its neighbouring district of Chorio as we learn more about the hospitable harbour of the island, a popular resting place for sailors to park up and explore.Symi is home to a long tradition of shipbuilding, handmade boats with real charm. Get to know first-hand this handiwork before visiting the historic castle and taking a ride on a traditional Grecian boat. You will see this apparently small island is filled with a vast variety of things to do, see and eat.Join us on Nautical Channel on our journey to the Aegean Sea to discover the secrets of Symi.

programme.title: Les Voiles de Saint Tropez - Episode 1 - Portrait of Les Voiles De St Tropez
programme.desc: Welcome to the 20th edition of Les Voiles de St. Tropez. The legendary bay of Brigitte Bardot is home one more time to one of the most glamorous regattas in the world. Here, more than 200 Classic and modern yachts sail side by side in the golden Saint Tropez to win this delightful competition.

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 2bis Freestyle Portimao, Portugal
programme.desc: The UIM-ABP Aquabike World Championship Oﬀshore event has kicked the 2019 season in the European City of Sport for 2019, Portimao, Portugal. More than 70 riders from 26 countries will battle in six categories: the Ski Division GP1, the Ski Ladies GP1, the Freestyle, the Runabout GP1 as well as the Ski GP Junior 3.3 and 3.2. In this episode, we will focus on the Runabout GP1 and Freestyle action from the Grand Prix of Portugal. Come join us!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 4
programme.desc: Vodice is a famous tourist destination known for many breathtaking beaches and vibrant and rich offer of all tourist attractions. It is known for its liveliness and its friendly hosts. Located on the coast in a wide bay, 11 km northwest ofŠibenik, it is the ideal vacation spot for everyone. Check it out in this episode of Sail-ho Croatia!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 5
programme.desc: The region of Imotski is a historical name for the area. We are determined in today's episode to visit this region and a town straight out of a fairytale - magical Imotski. We’ll indulge in natural beauties and set off across the sea to the islands of Iž, Molat and Dugi otok. Stay with us and find out more about this wonderful area!

programme.title: Flavours of Venice - Episode 1
programme.desc: In this episode, Andi takes us on a journey around the streets of Venice, the sinking city. We will discover unique stores that are sank underwater and learn more about the history and elements of the famous gondola. Then, we will be visiting the Ristorante Riviera by the hand of the Chef Cremonini and asking him to join us onboard to enjoy a delicious meal. Come join us!

programme.title: Flavours of Venice - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this second episode of Flavours of Venice, Andi will be learning the art of the gondola, visiting one of the most beautiful displays of art and getting a taste of the lagoon. She will not only be in the city with cicchetti, but also on board with Dimitri Gris. Join her on this new adventure of Flavours of Venice, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Un día en...Salón Internacional Náutico de Barcelona - Salón Internacional Barcelona - Ep9
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Flavours Of The Sea - Episode 1
programme.desc: We arrive to the port to meet Chef Panos and invite him onboard to try a delicious recipe: linguine with shrimps. The Chef Panos will show us the Greek heritage in the food and a secret ingredient he uses to give his plates his own taste. Then, we go around the port to see whether if we can share this delicious platter with strangers. Then, we meet Chef Nikos to discover a special recipe he has for us.

programme.title: Sailing Fever In Annapolis
programme.desc: Welcome to Annapolis!Maryland’s capital city and located on Chesapeake, its historic district includes houses from the 18th century. Besides its historical interest, the city is one of the most exciting places to go to in the United States for nautical sports as yearly hundreds of enthusiasts come here for recreational or competitive races and regattas. Host Lucia Metzbauer heads to the Chesapeake Bay to discover what makes it one of the USA's top sailing destinations. Be part of an exciting regatta, visit the prestigious Yacht Club, meet the locals to enjoy steam crabs and work on your balance with Yoga on a Paddleboard – so many different things going on in this charming seaport. Join Lucia for a journey into American maritime history and an exclusive look at the famous 2014 Annapolis Spring Sailboat Show.

programme.title: A Day At DIBS
programme.desc: Dubai International Boat Show, the most trusted and established marine industry exhibition in the Middle East. Despite misconceptions claiming luxury yachts to be the main attraction in this event, the DIBS offer a much wider variety of expositions on nautical news, sports and lifestyle. It differs from other shows as it has a more exclusive clientele and many professionals of this world are yearning to come.You will adventure into one of Dubai’s most prestigious shows featuring the latest releases of yachts and boats from both local and international builders together with the innovations in marine equipment and accessories.Discover all its secret gems with Nautical Channel.

programme.desc: Emirates Team New Zealand follows the script and gets the pass to take on the Defender for the 35th America's Cup Match. 100% fly-time, 40 knot match races, close scalls, close contact, a helmsmen going overboard... we will take an in depth look at safety in a modern day America's Cup. Then on exclusive: Franck Cammas encounters a rudder blade and we dive into the body gear for the AC50 crews with Thierry Fouchier.

programme.title: Sailing to the Games - Episode 5
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Sailing Fever In Annapolis
programme.desc: Welcome to Annapolis!Maryland’s capital city and located on Chesapeake, its historic district includes houses from the 18th century. Besides its historical interest, the city is one of the most exciting places to go to in the United States for nautical sports as yearly hundreds of enthusiasts come here for recreational or competitive races and regattas. Host Lucia Metzbauer heads to the Chesapeake Bay to discover what makes it one of the USA's top sailing destinations. Be part of an exciting regatta, visit the prestigious Yacht Club, meet the locals to enjoy steam crabs and work on your balance with Yoga on a Paddleboard – so many different things going on in this charming seaport. Join Lucia for a journey into American maritime history and an exclusive look at the famous 2014 Annapolis Spring Sailboat Show.

programme.title: Flavours of Venice - Episode 1
programme.desc: In this episode, Andi takes us on a journey around the streets of Venice, the sinking city. We will discover unique stores that are sank underwater and learn more about the history and elements of the famous gondola. Then, we will be visiting the Ristorante Riviera by the hand of the Chef Cremonini and asking him to join us onboard to enjoy a delicious meal. Come join us!

programme.title: Flavours of Venice - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this second episode of Flavours of Venice, Andi will be learning the art of the gondola, visiting one of the most beautiful displays of art and getting a taste of the lagoon. She will not only be in the city with cicchetti, but also on board with Dimitri Gris. Join her on this new adventure of Flavours of Venice, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Who is Vilayta
programme.desc: WHO IS VILAYTA reveals the nature of Vilayta, one of the pioneers of big wave surfing on the Canary Islands. This short biographical documentary shares with us his deep connection with the ocean and Germán Pinelo captures this perfectly in this impressive world.This short documentary is full of unrepeatable moments. Filled with people who love what they do, that do not stop dreaming and living life how they want to. Combining passions, dreams, friendship, craziness and sweetness, Who is Vilayta deepens the character beyond the figure of the surfer. An artful motion picture that breaks myth and makes legends.

programme.title: Tidal
programme.desc: Tidal follows the journey of Lisa Beasley. After she suffered a horrible BASE jumping accident, she struggles to return to the ocean, but ends convincing herself to venture back into the water. Lisa’s journey begins with a childhood love of water and sea life. Lucky of surviving the accident, she must now face an immense recovery period that brings her closer to her mother as well as her first love: the sea.As Lisa struggles to find an exercise she can handle, she starts discovering the beauty surrounding Cape Town’s ocean. The tidal pools in particular became very meaningful to Lisa’s recovery, and she must now work to protect them from the harmful historical cleaning protocols that kill the marine life she has come to love.Watch Lisa’s inspirational transformation and realisation of the beauty of the ocean in this impactful documentary that reminds us of the importance of self-recovery and reconnection with the ocean. Available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 3
programme.desc: Out of the fray and sitting pretty after winning the Round Robin qualifiers, Oracle Team USA now waits for the winner. Following the script, France says goodbye while the fabulous four New Zealand, Sweden, Great Britain and Japan take on the Louis Vuitton Challenger Playoffs. We will talk with weather guru inside the role of America's Cup meteorologists and close up at the heart of Artemis Racing, the Swedish Challenger.

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 4
programme.desc: Emirates Team New Zealand follows the script and gets the pass to take on the Defender for the 35th America's Cup Match. 100% fly-time, 40 knot match races, close scalls, close contact, a helmsmen going overboard... we will take an in depth look at safety in a modern day America's Cup. Then on exclusive: Franck Cammas encounters a rudder blade and we dive into the body gear for the AC50 crews with Thierry Fouchier.

programme.title: What Sup - Episode 1
programme.desc: In this first episode of What SUP we meet David Brent and go paddleboarding for a chat on the water. He will talk about his experience on the stage before trying out the popular paddleboard yoga with Winny Clarke. We will hopefully learn how to relax on the water and not fall out of our boards too much!

programme.title: What Sup - Episode 2
programme.desc: Welcome to the second episode of What SUP. On today's episode, comedian Ryan Maglunob and the band the Elwins will join us in our adventures. Chris first saw Ryan perform live a few months ago, and he was amused throughout the whole set. Let's go take a paddle with Ryan before playing paddle pong and many other challenges!

programme.title: PWA World Cup - Tiberias, Israel
programme.desc: Athletes are meeting in Tiberias, Israel, for the PWA World Cup. This first leg of this year's competition will be filled with action after 18 months of inactivity. With winds between 18 and 30 knots, it will truly be a challenge for the world's best windsurf sailors and with this uncertainty in the conditions, we can expect anything to happen in Israel. Don't miss out on the PWA World Cup 2021 in Tiberias that marks the beginning of this year's windsurfing action!

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 5
programme.desc: Emirates Team New Zealand take Bermuda by storm as Peter Burling knocks out James Spithill in the first four races. Now, it's an uphill battle for Oracle Team USA at the 35th America's Cup. On the tech specs, we unveil the secrets of speed and why Team New Zealand has delivered a better overall package on their powerful AC50 'Aoateroa'. Watch the full recap of the AC35 kickoff.

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 6
programme.desc: When the out-spending was impossible, out-thinking did the job. Emirates Team New Zealand has dominated the 35th America's Cup Match seven to one to become the new Defender. After nearly two decades, the end of both the Alinghi and Oracle Eras is here and the kiwis are back on the top of the world. We will watch the battles, highlights and comments of this historic victory.

programme.title: Shifting Ice + Changing Tides
programme.desc: In March 2014 six women set sail from Iceland with the intention of sailing across the Denmark Strait and up the west coast of Greenland. Shifting Ice and Changing Tides' is a unique human and wind powered, female led, ski and sail expedition that is captivating for the beauty of its white, gelid landscape.In this remote, fascinating and beautiful region, six women will explore and ski first descents while limiting their environmental footprint by sailing and climbing. The expedition will serve as a platform for raising awareness about climate change and environmental issues as well as for inspiring and promoting female participation in snow sports adventures.Join them as they adventure in the wilderness to collect scientific data in one of the most incredible and deathly climates. This is their story.

programme.title: Sofia
programme.desc: Sofía is a short documentary film about the life of young surfer Sofía De Tomás, Canary Islands’ surf champion. Originally from La Orotava, Tenerife, Sofia tells us through interviews and cinematic shoots about her surfing lifestyle and what inclined her towards the surf world.Sofia balances her time between painting and surfing, and for her painting has a similar effect sometimes as surfing. However, for Sofia, surfing is a sport that traps you, and once you start it, you can’t stop, you want more. It’s something she can’t live without.Live the beauty of the Canary Islands in this short documentary film about this young talent in the surf world. Sofia offers beautiful scenery, heart-warming moments and a strong desire to get on a board yourself and start surfing the world.

programme.title: Tahitian Swell
programme.desc: The French Polynesia is world famous not only for its clear blue waters, but also for the quality of its waves to the delight of worldwide surfers. These waves are generated by the swell; an undulating movement of the sea surface that advances as it does not break.If the French Polynesia is one of the kingdoms of surfing, it is thanks to its geographical location. Nestled in the heart of the South Pacific, this group of five archipelagos cover an area as vast as Europe and benefit all year round from swells generated by the four winds.The conditions are therefore ideal for the many wave lovers: surfers, windsurfers, bodyboarders... but in order for them to enjoy these conditions, knowledge of marine forecasting is essential. This is where the Polynesian branch of Météo France takes place, including amongst their team swell specialists as Kenji Flohr, a Polynesian forecaster and surfer.His mission is to anticipate the waves that will break on the Polynesian coasts, by analysing the swells, their direction, period, energy, length, and dimensions. The expertise of this surfer forecaster enables to popularize a set of advanced analyses. This makes this didactic documentary accessible to all. And thanks to Kenji Flohr’s crystal clear explanations like the water of the Pacific Ocean, this complex system becomes clear and above all… fascinating.Learn more about the Tahitian Swell and the scientific approach for predicting waves, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 1
programme.desc: In this first episode of 2017, we travel to the paradise beach of Pak Nam Pran, in southern Thailand for the first kite racing event of the year – the Asian Twin Tip Racing Championships. We also head south-east from Thailand to Indonesia, a country blessed with some of the best waves on the planet – and we meet up with pro kite wave surfers: Keahi de Aboitiz, Moona Whyte and Matt Elsasser. We visit another great place for kiting, Zanzibar, the pearl of the Indian Ocean, located east of Tanzania and from Zanzibar to Chile, to the big rocks of this incredibly wild coastline and consistently powerful waves. Finally, we move to Korea where the world’s top pro-riders faced off at the first round of the 2017 IKA Kitefoil Gold Cup.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this episode we fly to Europe and descend on Italy’s notorious Gizzeria kiteboarding spot, where the riders really like to be Uncool – in a statement of “reverse kudos”. Thanks to its reputation for excellent kiteboarding conditions and a relaxing ambience, Hangloose Beach annually hosts some of the world's top events. We catch up with the 2017 IKA TwinTip Racing Slalom European Championship where the titles are closely fought among a line-up of almost 120 riders from 21 different countries. In addition, multiple Champion Oliver Bridge is going to introduce us to the basics of kite control.

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 11
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 12
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Sailing to the Games - Episode 5
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Sailing Fever In Annapolis
programme.desc: Welcome to Annapolis!Maryland’s capital city and located on Chesapeake, its historic district includes houses from the 18th century. Besides its historical interest, the city is one of the most exciting places to go to in the United States for nautical sports as yearly hundreds of enthusiasts come here for recreational or competitive races and regattas. Host Lucia Metzbauer heads to the Chesapeake Bay to discover what makes it one of the USA's top sailing destinations. Be part of an exciting regatta, visit the prestigious Yacht Club, meet the locals to enjoy steam crabs and work on your balance with Yoga on a Paddleboard – so many different things going on in this charming seaport. Join Lucia for a journey into American maritime history and an exclusive look at the famous 2014 Annapolis Spring Sailboat Show.

programme.title: Les Voiles de Saint Tropez - Episode 1 - Portrait of Les Voiles De St Tropez
programme.desc: Welcome to the 20th edition of Les Voiles de St. Tropez. The legendary bay of Brigitte Bardot is home one more time to one of the most glamorous regattas in the world. Here, more than 200 Classic and modern yachts sail side by side in the golden Saint Tropez to win this delightful competition.

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 2bis Freestyle Portimao, Portugal
programme.desc: The UIM-ABP Aquabike World Championship Oﬀshore event has kicked the 2019 season in the European City of Sport for 2019, Portimao, Portugal. More than 70 riders from 26 countries will battle in six categories: the Ski Division GP1, the Ski Ladies GP1, the Freestyle, the Runabout GP1 as well as the Ski GP Junior 3.3 and 3.2. In this episode, we will focus on the Runabout GP1 and Freestyle action from the Grand Prix of Portugal. Come join us!

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 5
programme.desc: Emirates Team New Zealand take Bermuda by storm as Peter Burling knocks out James Spithill in the first four races. Now, it's an uphill battle for Oracle Team USA at the 35th America's Cup. On the tech specs, we unveil the secrets of speed and why Team New Zealand has delivered a better overall package on their powerful AC50 'Aoateroa'. Watch the full recap of the AC35 kickoff.

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 6
programme.desc: When the out-spending was impossible, out-thinking did the job. Emirates Team New Zealand has dominated the 35th America's Cup Match seven to one to become the new Defender. After nearly two decades, the end of both the Alinghi and Oracle Eras is here and the kiwis are back on the top of the world. We will watch the battles, highlights and comments of this historic victory.

programme.title: PWA World Cup - Tiberias, Israel
programme.desc: Athletes are meeting in Tiberias, Israel, for the PWA World Cup. This first leg of this year's competition will be filled with action after 18 months of inactivity. With winds between 18 and 30 knots, it will truly be a challenge for the world's best windsurf sailors and with this uncertainty in the conditions, we can expect anything to happen in Israel. Don't miss out on the PWA World Cup 2021 in Tiberias that marks the beginning of this year's windsurfing action!

programme.title: Flavours of Venice - Episode 1
programme.desc: In this episode, Andi takes us on a journey around the streets of Venice, the sinking city. We will discover unique stores that are sank underwater and learn more about the history and elements of the famous gondola. Then, we will be visiting the Ristorante Riviera by the hand of the Chef Cremonini and asking him to join us onboard to enjoy a delicious meal. Come join us!

programme.title: Flavours of Venice - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this second episode of Flavours of Venice, Andi will be learning the art of the gondola, visiting one of the most beautiful displays of art and getting a taste of the lagoon. She will not only be in the city with cicchetti, but also on board with Dimitri Gris. Join her on this new adventure of Flavours of Venice, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: What Sup - Episode 1
programme.desc: In this first episode of What SUP we meet David Brent and go paddleboarding for a chat on the water. He will talk about his experience on the stage before trying out the popular paddleboard yoga with Winny Clarke. We will hopefully learn how to relax on the water and not fall out of our boards too much!

programme.title: What Sup - Episode 2
programme.desc: Welcome to the second episode of What SUP. On today's episode, comedian Ryan Maglunob and the band the Elwins will join us in our adventures. Chris first saw Ryan perform live a few months ago, and he was amused throughout the whole set. Let's go take a paddle with Ryan before playing paddle pong and many other challenges!

programme.title: Les Voiles de Saint Tropez - Episode 2 - Meeting and Sailing at Les Voiles De St Tropez
programme.desc: Marking the end of the Mediterranean yachting season, Les Voiles de Saint Tropez will be back for its 20th edition. Close to 4,000 sailors and more than 300 sailing yachts will gather in St Tropez in early autumn for an action-packed programme of competitive racing and lively social events.

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 3 Olbia, ITALY
programme.desc: With 150 competitors from over 30 countries, the UIM ABP Tour is ready for another weekend of non-stop action with the elite riders, joined by new riders competing in the single events of the UIM ABP Aquabike World Championship. In this episode, we are ready to see all the ski action in the Grand Prix of Italy taking place in Olbia.Come join us in this beautiful holiday destination that attracted international riders for the world champion title.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this episode we fly to Europe and descend on Italy’s notorious Gizzeria kiteboarding spot, where the riders really like to be Uncool – in a statement of “reverse kudos”. Thanks to its reputation for excellent kiteboarding conditions and a relaxing ambience, Hangloose Beach annually hosts some of the world's top events. We catch up with the 2017 IKA TwinTip Racing Slalom European Championship where the titles are closely fought among a line-up of almost 120 riders from 21 different countries. In addition, multiple Champion Oliver Bridge is going to introduce us to the basics of kite control.

programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Sailing Fever In Annapolis
programme.desc: Welcome to Annapolis!Maryland’s capital city and located on Chesapeake, its historic district includes houses from the 18th century. Besides its historical interest, the city is one of the most exciting places to go to in the United States for nautical sports as yearly hundreds of enthusiasts come here for recreational or competitive races and regattas. Host Lucia Metzbauer heads to the Chesapeake Bay to discover what makes it one of the USA's top sailing destinations. Be part of an exciting regatta, visit the prestigious Yacht Club, meet the locals to enjoy steam crabs and work on your balance with Yoga on a Paddleboard – so many different things going on in this charming seaport. Join Lucia for a journey into American maritime history and an exclusive look at the famous 2014 Annapolis Spring Sailboat Show.

programme.title: PWA World Cup - Tiberias, Israel
programme.desc: Athletes are meeting in Tiberias, Israel, for the PWA World Cup. This first leg of this year's competition will be filled with action after 18 months of inactivity. With winds between 18 and 30 knots, it will truly be a challenge for the world's best windsurf sailors and with this uncertainty in the conditions, we can expect anything to happen in Israel. Don't miss out on the PWA World Cup 2021 in Tiberias that marks the beginning of this year's windsurfing action!

programme.title: Flavours of Venice - Episode 1
programme.desc: In this episode, Andi takes us on a journey around the streets of Venice, the sinking city. We will discover unique stores that are sank underwater and learn more about the history and elements of the famous gondola. Then, we will be visiting the Ristorante Riviera by the hand of the Chef Cremonini and asking him to join us onboard to enjoy a delicious meal. Come join us!

programme.title: Flavours of Venice - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this second episode of Flavours of Venice, Andi will be learning the art of the gondola, visiting one of the most beautiful displays of art and getting a taste of the lagoon. She will not only be in the city with cicchetti, but also on board with Dimitri Gris. Join her on this new adventure of Flavours of Venice, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Les Voiles de Saint Tropez - Episode 2 - Meeting and Sailing at Les Voiles De St Tropez
programme.desc: Marking the end of the Mediterranean yachting season, Les Voiles de Saint Tropez will be back for its 20th edition. Close to 4,000 sailors and more than 300 sailing yachts will gather in St Tropez in early autumn for an action-packed programme of competitive racing and lively social events.

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 3 Olbia, ITALY
programme.desc: With 150 competitors from over 30 countries, the UIM ABP Tour is ready for another weekend of non-stop action with the elite riders, joined by new riders competing in the single events of the UIM ABP Aquabike World Championship. In this episode, we are ready to see all the ski action in the Grand Prix of Italy taking place in Olbia.Come join us in this beautiful holiday destination that attracted international riders for the world champion title.

programme.title: Dis.Traction
programme.desc: The two-time world wave sailing champion Marcilio Browne, originally from Brazil, has decided to make the Hawaiian island of Maui his permanent home to pursue his passion. Dis.Traction follows Marcilio during his first training sessions leading into to the decisive season’s final contest where the greatest windsurfers compete for the ultimate prize.Following the end of contest season, Marcilio and fellow wave sailing champion Morgan Noireaux take to the mountains, or rather to the volcano for some alternative action. As the island is exposed to heavy ground swells from many directions, Marcilio and his friends are always looking for ideal spots to practice.Dis.Traction is a rollercoaster ride of action and an authentic insight into the perspective of a seasoned professional windsurfer. Shot on location it features the breathtaking beauty of the Hawaiian Island of Maui and showcases appearances of some of the sport’s greatest athletes.

programme.title: Torrevieja Euromarina Optimist International Trophy - XV Trofeo Euromarina Optimist Torrevieja
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: What Sup - Episode 3
programme.desc: On this week's episode we join comedian Daniel Woodrow and violin virtuoso Dr. Draw for a paddle. Daniel has been seen on Just For Laughs, CTV, Comedy Network and some more, so let's see if he has any fresh jokes ready for us as we try out some challenges on the water. Are you ready?

programme.title: What Sup - Episode 4
programme.desc: Welcome back for the fourth episode of What SUP! On tonight's episode we have actress Kimberly Sue-Murray, known for her recurring role in the Lizzie Borden Chronicles opposite Christina Ricci on Lifetime. She will join us for a chat onboard our paddleboards before heading the challenges head on. Let's go!

programme.title: Bora Bora: Paddling Paradise
programme.desc: In Bora Bora: Paddling Paradise Nikolai visits the crystal blue lagoons, encounters sharks and stingrays and witnesses the 6th edition of the Muramur surfski race in Tahiti. The intensive 38 km race meandering through reefs that surround the mystic island of Bora Bora is bound to make you pack your flippers and book a flight to the exotic French Polynesia.You can now watch this exclusive show that will take you to one of the world’s most beautiful sceneries on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Journey To Giglio
programme.desc: On January of 2012 the Italian cruise ship Costa Concordia sank in shallow waters after striking an underwater rock off Isola del Giglio. Many things remained unclear about this tragedy, so Andi van Zyl is set to discover the truth regarding this incident.Journey to Giglio is an investigative piece on the infamous Costa Concordia tragedy. Andi van Zyl is on the Italian island of Giglio for an exclusive exposé on the shipwreck that shocked the world. She will leave no rock unturned as she digs into what happened the night of the accident and uncovers the disaster’s impact on the local residents and economy.Highlights include exploration of the island and disaster site, and an interview with the man at the helm of the salvage operation, Nick Sloane. Andi sits down with the fellow South African to discuss the delicate process of freeing the wrecked cruise-liner from the reef without spoiling the pristine waters of Giglio Island.Find out the mystery behind the sinking of Costa Concordia on this Journey to Giglio.
