programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 10
programme.desc: The island of Rab has a rich history and has been inhabited by numerous great personalities. The Romans named this place Felix Arba or Lucky, which actually means Happy island. With 30 sandy beaches, Rab is truly a happy island and its beauty has been recognized by tourists from around the world for almost 125 years.

programme.title: Moana Waiwai
programme.desc: Moana Waiwai follows the Free Swim journey of wahine (woman) Ally Davey as she takes on 70km of open ocean around the stunning Coromandel coastline to bring awareness to the protection of New Zealand’s oceans.For over three days it does more than encapsulate stunning panoramas on the extraordinary scenario of New Zealand. It is also inspiring for people as we become aware of the natural beauty of the ocean so we can protect it before it is too late.This is an inspirational film, not an activist propaganda, that highlights exploration and the intrinsic benefits of getting wet and looking below the surface. In Moana Waiwai Ally Davey will champion endurance of her human spirit in this seemingly impossible task to achieve a higher goal: protection of the oceans.Be part of her adventure on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Ocean Safari - Kenya - Episode 3
programme.desc: We venture into Kenya’s wild coastline in the Watamu region. This Marine reserve is incredibly unique and in order for Andi to truly experience it she has to learn to kite surf in a very short period of time. She needs help, so she decides to track down the Tribe Watersports and Ben Kelliher who will guide her through a crash course in kitesurfing. If she can do it in the allocated time, Ben has an incredible prize waiting for her.

programme.title: Ocean Safari - Kenya - Episode 4
programme.desc: Andi is back in the Watamu Marine Reserve but this time on a new mission: save the endangered sea turtles. She spends three days at the Local Ocean Trust with Marine Biologist Casper van de Geer. If Andi can learn the importance of sea turtles in the marine ecosystem and the vital skills needed to protect them, she might have the opportunity to release a turtle back into the wild.

programme.title: Maxiboat TV Show - Episode 3
programme.desc: Welcome to the third episode of Maxiboat. This month, we will be putting the brand new Beneteau GT45 to test. Then, French sailor Francois Gabart will show us his future offshore racing trimaran while we go for a quick tour around the Mer Concept shipyard in Concarneau. Finally, we shine on some highlights of the 2021 Jet Raid in Greece, the Dakar of the Seas or the longest jetski race in the world.

programme.title: Maxiboat TV Show - Episode 4
programme.desc: On the fourth episode of Maxiboat, we are back to the Monaco Energy Boat Challenge 2021 that gathered boats motored by alternative propulsion like hydrogen, electric motors and solar. Then we remember the best moments of the Super Yacht Cup in Palma. To finish off, we focus on an XXL Italian luxury rib Pirelli 35 and share the first images before the autumn boat shows of the X Power 33C, the first motor boat from the Danish shipyard X Yachts.

programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Sylt - The Queen Of The North Sea
programme.desc: Welcome to Sylt! The northernmost island of Germany spreads for 40 kilometers and has been since ages a top nautical location. All year round you can find action here at the North Sea, and Nautical Channel host Lucia Metzbauer is ready to disembark in this location and explore the queen of the North Sea with our team. She will meet the locals, get to know the hidden gems, the best places for surfing and sailing, discover the wildlife and explore the enormous PWA Grand Slam in Sylt – the windsurfing event to be! Get ready to dive into Sylt's secrets as we wander around an UNESCO World Heritage Site and get splashed with the windsurf action. Let's get going to Sylt - The Queen of the North Sea!

programme.title: Escape to Zanzibar - Episode 1
programme.desc: As soon as we arrive on the island, we begin to explore Zanzibar starting in the northern part of the country. Nungwi, our chosen location is a common touristic destination and its guests are famously welcoming. Let's begin our journey by visiting the famous sea turtle conservation and protection center. Buckle up for this adventure!

programme.title: Escape to Zanzibar - Episode 2
programme.desc: We begin this day of discoveries with a visit to the most important historical landmarks in Stone Town. For lunch, we head straight on to The Rock: one of Zanzibar's greatest icons. The restaurant was literally built on a rock and can only be reached on foot during the low tide. Then, we will follow Shabed's suggestion and dive into the water to try all the activities available.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 5
programme.desc: First stop for this episode is the exotic destination and kiteboarding playground of Mauritius, for one of the most high-profile and biggest kite-foiling events: the Hydrofoil Pro Tour. From one island to another, we leave the exotic racetracks of Mauritius and head to Cagliari on Sardinia for another exciting gathering of the world's best kitefoiling riders. The World Championship also marked the close of the 2017 Kitefoil Gold Cup World Series.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 6
programme.desc: In this episode, we move to Dongshan, China for the 2017 Dongshan China International Kiteboarding Open. Combining culture with heritage, this small island, located along the Taiwan Strait, hosts a population of 200,000. The Youth Olympic Games is a hot topic in the Kiteboarding community, eagerly anticipated by riders and supporters. Reflecting an exciting and new race format, the slalom/boarder-cross is designed to challenge the riders' ability to stay in control, while maintaining maximum speed.

programme.title: What Sup - Episode 7
programme.desc: On episode seven of What SUP we have stand up and sketch comedian Stephanie Tolev. She was recently awarded 2015 Female Canadian Comedian of the year, and has performed at the prestigious Just For Laughs Comedy Festival across the country. We are ready to head down to the water with her and have some laughs, care to join in?

programme.title: What Sup - Episode 8
programme.desc: On this week's episode of What SUP we have comedian Dom Pare and the powerful rock band 20Amp. Dom is one of Chris' favourite comedians in Canada, and he is sure his quick wit and unconventional charm will win you over. We are taking him for some laughs on our paddle. Come watch along!

programme.title: Route du Rhum - Episode 1 - Review
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Season Review - Runabout & Freestyle
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 4 Qingdao, China
programme.desc: The UIM-ABP Aquabike World Championship has headed to a brand new venue as the world's best riders step up a gear at the Grand Prix of Qingdao in China. This round three of the season has more than 60 riders gather for the best aquabike action. In this episode, we will bring you all the men's and women's ski action.Get ready to immerse yourself in the races happening at the Chinese seaport, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Magnifique Martinique
programme.desc: Martinique is truly magnificent!The Caribbean Island is a paradise for both locals and visitors that year after year come to discover the mysteries of this island. Come discover the beauty of life in the Caribbean in this show.Nautical Channel’s host, Andrew Miller, will show you exciting new places and delicious local cuisine prepared by a great chef. Famous Caribbean Rum for breakfast and an intense session of fly boarding will guarantee madness fun in this exhilarating adventure in Magnifique Martinique.Follow Andrew on a unique discovery in this French holiday destination, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Ocean Safari - Kenya - Episode 3
programme.desc: We venture into Kenya’s wild coastline in the Watamu region. This Marine reserve is incredibly unique and in order for Andi to truly experience it she has to learn to kite surf in a very short period of time. She needs help, so she decides to track down the Tribe Watersports and Ben Kelliher who will guide her through a crash course in kitesurfing. If she can do it in the allocated time, Ben has an incredible prize waiting for her.

programme.title: Ocean Safari - Kenya - Episode 4
programme.desc: Andi is back in the Watamu Marine Reserve but this time on a new mission: save the endangered sea turtles. She spends three days at the Local Ocean Trust with Marine Biologist Casper van de Geer. If Andi can learn the importance of sea turtles in the marine ecosystem and the vital skills needed to protect them, she might have the opportunity to release a turtle back into the wild.

programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Inside Sailing - Episode 6
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Discovering Karpathos - Part 1
programme.desc: We are set to visit the rich in tradition village of Olimpos and to swim in the clear waters of some of the most beautiful beaches in the Mediterranean. Then, we will discover some of the secrets by the seabed of the island and the creatures that inhabit them. This episode would not be complete without trying a watersport, so we will try to fly on to a kitesurf. Will you fly away with us?

programme.title: Discovering Karpathos - Part 2
programme.desc: We take a stroll down the village of Arkansa, in the middle of Karpathos. The village is loved by tourists who have been coming for over 20 years. Then, we are going to explore some of the ruins of the island, starting in the north in the ancient Vrikous. The island is filled with Ancient Greek ruins we cannot miss on before boarding on a windsurf experience. With the Meltemi wind, Karpathos has become a windsurfing paradise.

programme.title: Sailing Documentary Show
programme.desc: Sailing boats have always come in different shapes and size. Whether if they are used for competition, fishing or recreational use, competition has always been at the heart of sport, pushing boundaries in technological advancements.The Extreme Sailing Series combines the top class sailing teams and the advanced innovations in technology, and watching the races becomes a thrill to spectators. With circuits that range through eight global events, the Extreme Sailing Series is breaking boundaries. Follow the journey of boats that are some of the fastest in production and that can reach speeds of just under 40 knots or almost 75 kilometres per hour.

programme.title: Guadeloupe: Caribbean Blues
programme.desc: A visit to Guadeloupe is like visiting all corners of our world’s beauty. Looking to the left you can catch a breeze that swifts a kite surfer in the air, and to the right a gust of smoke from the Soufriere’s volcanic top. Everything in between is a perfectly balanced mixture of colour, tradition, and a lifestyle to die for.Guadeloupe: Caribbean Blues takes us on a trip to this dreamy destination. Rhythm and music go hand in hand in the Caribbean as different styles combine forming unique masterpieces that have us all dancing in no time. Get ready to dance to the sound of music, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: OFQUI
programme.desc: The Isthmus of Ofqui, unknown for many and chosen as surf destination by few adventurers.The stretch of land that separates the Pacific Ocean's inland seas, is the only way to make it if you want to surf the shores of Golfo de Penas. Connecting the Taitao Peninsula with the Chilean mainland, Ofqui offers world class waves. This thaw surf film approaches the vast territory of the Patagonia in different ways, this time, centered around Ofqui.Pro surfers will face ice-cold waters in their expedition to surf deathly waves in Ofqui, one of the most unknown locations of the Patagonia and with a microclimate that maximises the upcoming waves.Join them in their adventure to Ofqui here, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: RORC Caribbean 600
programme.desc: The RORC Caribbean 600 is an exciting 600-mile offshore race that takes competitors around some of the most beautiful islands of the Caribbean. In its 12th edition, more than 73 boats from 22 countries joined in a competition with participants from over 37 different nationalities.The fleet is made up not only of professional sailors and their boats, but also with Corinthian amateurs that love this offshore race. As it is the only offshore race in the Caribbean, it gets the attention of the best sailors worldwide. The race starts and finishes in Antigua and weaves its way around 11 different islands including St. Maarten and Guadaloupe amongst them.Be part of this unique race across the Caribbean with Nautical Channel and find out what crew will raise with victory.

programme.title: Posh Port - Madeira
programme.desc: In this episode, host Andi van Zyl gets an inside look at the eco-friendly Quinta do Lorde of Portugal's Madeira island. We will interview the Marina Manager at this dazzling destination and Andi will explore the marina and surrounding coastline. Then, she will learn how to cook a delicious traditional platter and even go sailing taking a dive with dolphins!

programme.title: Posh Port - Montenegro
programme.desc: Posh Ports is a new Nautical Channel original series which takes viewers on exclusive tours of the world’s most extravagant marinas, and yacht clubs! In this episode, host Andrew Miller gets an inside look at the luxurious Porto Montenegro, explores the surrounding coastline, and puts his safety on the line wakeboarding in the marina!

programme.title: MAR
programme.desc: Surfing has ceased a long time ago to be considered a niche sport. As the mainstream industry discovers its potential for selling clothes, trips and a whole set of ‘lifestyle’ products, there are those who appreciate it for what it is in its purest form – a direct connection to mother nature.We accompany Big Wave surfer Alex Botelho and some of his friends to meet surfers who balance their love for the ocean and nature with a professional career in the sport. Mar is a tale of discovery, triumph and (almost) tragedy, but above all it is a life affirming pledge to positive vibes in and out of the line-up.Get ready to soak up a new conception of the world of surf as Alex Botelho unveils concepts unknown for the mainstream audience, available on Nautical Channel.Awards:Best Feature Documentary – Best Istanbul Film Festival 2021. Official Selections 2021: Ocean Film Festival World Tour, International Ocean Film Festival.

programme.title: Magnifique Martinique
programme.desc: Martinique is truly magnificent!The Caribbean Island is a paradise for both locals and visitors that year after year come to discover the mysteries of this island. Come discover the beauty of life in the Caribbean in this show.Nautical Channel’s host, Andrew Miller, will show you exciting new places and delicious local cuisine prepared by a great chef. Famous Caribbean Rum for breakfast and an intense session of fly boarding will guarantee madness fun in this exhilarating adventure in Magnifique Martinique.Follow Andrew on a unique discovery in this French holiday destination, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: 12 Hours to Live
programme.desc: 18 year old Amy is kidnapped by a deranged gunman wanted for the murder of an FBI Agent and FBI Agent Megan is hot on his trail. When it's learned that Amy is a type-1 diabetic, Megan must once again confront the man who violently killed her partner to save Amy.

programme.title: Last Chance Cafe
programme.desc: After uncovering evidence that her stepfather was murdered by a ring of corrupt cops and judges, including her DA ex-husband, a woman is forced to flee with her daughter and hide in a small farming town, where she falls for a local ranch owner but danger soon follows.

programme.title: San Saba
programme.desc: Private Investigator Bud wakes from a coma in a hospital room and is immediately charged with murder but did he do it or was he framed? As the story unfolds in flashback, Bud discovers that no one seems to be who he or she claim to be and everyone's motives are suspect.

programme.title: Universal Soldier II: Brothers in Arms
programme.desc: Luc and Veronica recover and revive Luc's long-lost brother who has been suspended in a cryo-chamber for decades and attempt to expose the Unisol program, led by Mazur (Gary Busey), which recycles dead soldiers in the attempt to create the ultimate mercenary army.

programme.title: Max Havoc: Ring of Fire
programme.desc: Max Havoc is on a new assignment staying at a luxury hotel in the heart of a big city only to discover that the classy hotel owner is a vicious mob boss heading up a crime ring full of unwanted teenagers in the nearby slums.

programme.title: Double Cross
programme.desc: Kathy Swanson and her neighbor, Sheryl, are both having difficulty with their husbands. So when Sheryl suggests to Kathy that they should get their lives back by killing each other’s husbands, Kathy facetiously sanctions the plan.

programme.title: Universal Soldier III: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Veronica and Luc conclude their quest to expose the Unisol program to the media and destroy Mentor's (Burt Reynolds) billion dollar heist, while the evil Dr. Walker creates a genetically engineered Unisol GR87, programmed with the single mission to destroy Luc and Veronica.

programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 3: Stunts, studs & sanctuaries
programme.desc: On this week’s RIDE we go behind the scenes with The Devil’s Horsemen - a family run company who have been providing horses & carriages for the film industry for over 30 years, we break down the art of dressage training at Australia’s Mulawa Performance, and we follow a successful rehabilitation and rehoming story at the Mare & Foal Sanctuary in England.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 4: Wild horses & Switzerland's jumping prodigy
programme.desc: On this week’s RIDE we’re taming some of New Zealand’s feral Kaimanawa horses with Kiwi adventurer Chloe Phillips-Harris, aiming for Tokyo and beyond with young Swiss jumper Bryan Balsiger, and swapping machinery for horses at one of Italy’s most environmentally friendly vineyards.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 3 - Miami
programme.desc: In the sunny scenario of Miami we're going to leave the beach for now to enjoy the third leg of the prestigious 2019 edition of the Longines Global Champions Tour. Standing at the top of equestrian sports, it is a competition like no other and riders compete to stand at the podium. Relive the best moments of the third leg of the 2019 LGCT.

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 3 - Miami
programme.desc: Welcome to Miami! This city filled with excitement is not only chosen for its white sand beaches and clear waters, but also for the equestrian community that enjoys the third leg of the 2019 GCL. Fun, competition and excitement take part in this event that mesmerises people from all over the world. Which teams will reach the podium in Miami?

programme.title: Longines FEI Jumping World Cup - Leg2 - Helsinky HL
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: FEI Ride Originals - Episode 11
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: FEI Ride Originals - Episode 12
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: FEI Dressage World Cup - Episode 1 - Salzburg
programme.desc: Welcome to Salzburg for the second leg of the FEI Dressage World Cup. We are in Austria to see some of the very best horse and rider combinations in the sport. Celebrating its 35th year, the FEI Dressage World Cup is the most distinguished individual competition in the international dressage calendar. Despite these challenging times and many events getting cancelled, Salzburg has proved herself a safe host to bring back the sport. Relive the highlights of the competition in Salzburg in the FEI Dressage World Cup of 2021.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 3 - Miami
programme.desc: In the sunny scenario of Miami we're going to leave the beach for now to enjoy the third leg of the prestigious 2019 edition of the Longines Global Champions Tour. Standing at the top of equestrian sports, it is a competition like no other and riders compete to stand at the podium. Relive the best moments of the third leg of the 2019 LGCT.

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 3 - Miami
programme.desc: Welcome to Miami! This city filled with excitement is not only chosen for its white sand beaches and clear waters, but also for the equestrian community that enjoys the third leg of the 2019 GCL. Fun, competition and excitement take part in this event that mesmerises people from all over the world. Which teams will reach the podium in Miami?

programme.title: Event Rider Masters - Arville
programme.desc: The Event Rider Masters takes a change in direction and heads to Belgium. We arrive to Arville Castle for the third leg of the series. Within the walls of the family estate of Guillaume de Liedekerke, Arville is an impressive venue with an extensive amount of woodland, hills and a beautiful lake. Relive the action at Arville in the 2019 edition of the Event Rider Masters.

programme.title: Event Rider Masters - Chatsworth House
programme.desc: The first leg of the 2019 Event Rider Masters series is about to start at The Dodson & Horrell Chatsworth International Horse Trials. The competition combines three days of thrilling eventing surrounded by the magical atmosphere of Chatsworth House. Riders will get ready to start with the right leg in the first event of the year. Relive the best moments of the Chatsworth House 2019 edition.

programme.title: Sunshine Tour - GP Suzuki
programme.desc: The CSI4* Suzuki Grand Prix is an emotional and exciting class. Horses jump as the crowd buzzes from the grades in a course designed by Santiago Varela. At the end of the first round, only 8 international riders got through to the jump off: Pénélope Leprevost, Cian O'Connor, Henk Van de Pol, Holly Smith, Pedro Junqueira, Laura Kraut, Marcel Marschall and Anthony Condon. With so much talent, the jump off was incredibly competitive in the 1.45m course. Relive the best moments of the Suzuki Grand Prix 2022 edition!

programme.title: Horse Academy Pro - Chapter 1
programme.desc: Welcome to the first episode of Horse Academy Pro! We are excitedly waiting for our contestants that will be participating in this exclusive show. Get ready to meet the professionals that will be rating the participants, the facilities and the coaches as contestants arrive and introduce themselves.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 18 - New York
programme.desc: New York is the chosen scenery for the eighteenth leg of the 2019 edition of the Longines Global Champions Tour. Riders still have a chance to change the scores and improve their rankings, so they will have to beat the obstacles under the sky of the Big Apple. Will they be able to change the scores of the competition?Watch the highlights of the 2019 LGCT competition in New York.

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 18 - New York
programme.desc: We are reaching the final moments of the Global Champions League. The eighteenth leg of the 2019 edition is finally here, and riders are ready to give their all this close to the end. We move to New York, the Big Apple, to enjoy this internationally awarded event that drives the attention of riders and public worldwide. Be part of the showjumping event that is moving the equestrian world. Relive the best moments of the eighteenth leg of the 2019 GCL

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 2 - Mexico City
programme.desc: Mexico City welcomes the second leg of the 2019 LGCT. This is the second time riders will compete in this international event, so now that they know how high the level is, they are eager to give their all and demonstrate their worth. Will they be able to reach the jump-off with no mistakes? Watch the best moments of the second leg in Mexico City.

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 2 - Mexico City
programme.desc: We travel to Mexico City for the second leg of the 2019 GCL. Riders team up to earn more points and get closer to the podium in this competition that travels around all continents. They will have to perform perfectly on the first round and then do their best during the jump-off. However, sometimes doing their best is not enough, as this competition expects them to do the extraordinary.

programme.title: FEI Dressage World Cup - Episode 1 - Salzburg
programme.desc: Welcome to Salzburg for the second leg of the FEI Dressage World Cup. We are in Austria to see some of the very best horse and rider combinations in the sport. Celebrating its 35th year, the FEI Dressage World Cup is the most distinguished individual competition in the international dressage calendar. Despite these challenging times and many events getting cancelled, Salzburg has proved herself a safe host to bring back the sport. Relive the highlights of the competition in Salzburg in the FEI Dressage World Cup of 2021.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 3: Stunts, studs & sanctuaries
programme.desc: On this week’s RIDE we go behind the scenes with The Devil’s Horsemen - a family run company who have been providing horses & carriages for the film industry for over 30 years, we break down the art of dressage training at Australia’s Mulawa Performance, and we follow a successful rehabilitation and rehoming story at the Mare & Foal Sanctuary in England.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 4: Wild horses & Switzerland's jumping prodigy
programme.desc: On this week’s RIDE we’re taming some of New Zealand’s feral Kaimanawa horses with Kiwi adventurer Chloe Phillips-Harris, aiming for Tokyo and beyond with young Swiss jumper Bryan Balsiger, and swapping machinery for horses at one of Italy’s most environmentally friendly vineyards.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 2 - Mexico City
programme.desc: Mexico City welcomes the second leg of the 2019 LGCT. This is the second time riders will compete in this international event, so now that they know how high the level is, they are eager to give their all and demonstrate their worth. Will they be able to reach the jump-off with no mistakes? Watch the best moments of the second leg in Mexico City.

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 2 - Mexico City
programme.desc: We travel to Mexico City for the second leg of the 2019 GCL. Riders team up to earn more points and get closer to the podium in this competition that travels around all continents. They will have to perform perfectly on the first round and then do their best during the jump-off. However, sometimes doing their best is not enough, as this competition expects them to do the extraordinary.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 3: Stunts, studs & sanctuaries
programme.desc: On this week’s RIDE we go behind the scenes with The Devil’s Horsemen - a family run company who have been providing horses & carriages for the film industry for over 30 years, we break down the art of dressage training at Australia’s Mulawa Performance, and we follow a successful rehabilitation and rehoming story at the Mare & Foal Sanctuary in England.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 4: Wild horses & Switzerland's jumping prodigy

programme.title: Event Rider Masters - Arville
programme.desc: The Event Rider Masters takes a change in direction and heads to Belgium. We arrive to Arville Castle for the third leg of the series. Within the walls of the family estate of Guillaume de Liedekerke, Arville is an impressive venue with an extensive amount of woodland, hills and a beautiful lake. Relive the action at Arville in the 2019 edition of the Event Rider Masters.

programme.title: Event Rider Masters - Chatsworth House
programme.desc: The first leg of the 2019 Event Rider Masters series is about to start at The Dodson & Horrell Chatsworth International Horse Trials. The competition combines three days of thrilling eventing surrounded by the magical atmosphere of Chatsworth House. Riders will get ready to start with the right leg in the first event of the year. Relive the best moments of the Chatsworth House 2019 edition.

programme.title: Sunshine Tour - GP Suzuki
programme.desc: The CSI4* Suzuki Grand Prix is an emotional and exciting class. Horses jump as the crowd buzzes from the grades in a course designed by Santiago Varela. At the end of the first round, only 8 international riders got through to the jump off: Pénélope Leprevost, Cian O'Connor, Henk Van de Pol, Holly Smith, Pedro Junqueira, Laura Kraut, Marcel Marschall and Anthony Condon. With so much talent, the jump off was incredibly competitive in the 1.45m course. Relive the best moments of the Suzuki Grand Prix 2022 edition!

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 3: Stunts, studs & sanctuaries
programme.desc: On this week’s RIDE we go behind the scenes with The Devil’s Horsemen - a family run company who have been providing horses & carriages for the film industry for over 30 years, we break down the art of dressage training at Australia’s Mulawa Performance, and we follow a successful rehabilitation and rehoming story at the Mare & Foal Sanctuary in England.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 4: Wild horses & Switzerland's jumping prodigy
programme.desc: On this week’s RIDE we’re taming some of New Zealand’s feral Kaimanawa horses with Kiwi adventurer Chloe Phillips-Harris, aiming for Tokyo and beyond with young Swiss jumper Bryan Balsiger, and swapping machinery for horses at one of Italy’s most environmentally friendly vineyards.

programme.title: FEI Dressage World Cup - Episode 1 - Salzburg
programme.desc: Welcome to Salzburg for the second leg of the FEI Dressage World Cup. We are in Austria to see some of the very best horse and rider combinations in the sport. Celebrating its 35th year, the FEI Dressage World Cup is the most distinguished individual competition in the international dressage calendar. Despite these challenging times and many events getting cancelled, Salzburg has proved herself a safe host to bring back the sport. Relive the highlights of the competition in Salzburg in the FEI Dressage World Cup of 2021.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 1: Minding, Mentoring & Mountain Magic
programme.desc: This week Ride celebrates the devotion of grooms working behind the scenes at the Longines FEI Jumping Nations Cup Final in Barcelona. We visit the UK’s Windrush Equestrian Foundation where legendary Eventer Pippa Funnell mentors young riders in the ways of the horse. And scale new heights in the Canadian Rockies at Mica Mountain Ranch, a place helping humans unbridle their lives and find inner peace through ponies.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 11 - Paris
programme.desc: The city of lovers, Paris, is the chosen venue for the eleventh leg of the 2019 LGCT. The audience is euphoric in this CSI5* level competition that drives the top riders in show jumping of the world into the French capital. There is a lot at stake as they could be considered the best riders in the world. Relive the best moments of the eleventh leg of the 2019 LGCT.

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 11 - Paris
programme.desc: Paris, the city of lovers, is the scenery for the eleventh leg of the 2019 GCL. Horse lovers will be able to enjoy the most exciting equestrian action in the latest show jumping competition. Magic is in the air and riders are ready for their best performance so far to improve their score.Watch the highlights of the competition in Paris.

programme.title: Polo Rider Cup Competition - Dos Lunas Polo Club vs Evviva Polo Saint-Moritz
programme.desc: Dos Lunas Polo Club is facing Evviva Polo Saint-Moritz in this heated game at the Polo Rider Cup 2021. Playing with a 10/12 goals handicap and 5 chukkers, both teams will try their best to keep advancing in the tournament, but it will not be an easy feat. Watch the best moments of the competition.

programme.title: Polo Rider Cup Competition - Polo Club de Chantilly vs Polo Park Zürich
programme.desc: The hosting team, Polo Club de Chantilly, is ready to take Polo Park Zürich in this game for the Polo Rider Cup. However, Park Zürich has been preparing diligently for this moment and is one of the strongest teams in the competition. Who will be the winner in this game? Find out on the Polo Rider Cup 2021 Competition.

programme.title: Longines FEI Nations Cup - 2019 Falsterbo Competition
programme.desc: The Longines FEI Nations Cup has arrived to Falsterbo, in Sweden, as the Longines Grand Prix of Falsterbo. Riders will compete in a Table A round before deciding who will make it to the jump off. The sun is out on the course designed by Frank Rothenberger with 13 obstacles and 16 efforts.The public awaits this magical moment of the Longines FEI Nations Cup that has 50 riders jumping obstacles with a CSI5* difficulty.Watch the full competition of the Longines FEI Nations Cup in Sweden, Falsterbo.

programme.title: Longines FEI Nations Cup - 2019 Falsterbo Competition
programme.desc: The Longines FEI Nations Cup has arrived to Falsterbo, in Sweden, as the Longines Grand Prix of Falsterbo. Riders will compete in a Table A round before deciding who will make it to the jump off. programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 5: Para Dressage Dreams & Campaigning for Change
programme.desc: On the final episode of the season we aim for a second gold medal with reigning Paralympic Champion Sanne Voets, raise awareness of inclusivity in the equestrian world with Ride Out Racism founder Reece McCook, and break down the art of eventing with British Equestrian’s Georgie Spence.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 1: Minding, Mentoring & Mountain Magic
programme.desc: This week Ride celebrates the devotion of grooms working behind the scenes at the Longines FEI Jumping Nations Cup Final in Barcelona. We visit the UK’s Windrush Equestrian Foundation where legendary Eventer Pippa Funnell mentors young riders in the ways of the horse. And scale new heights in the Canadian Rockies at Mica Mountain Ranch, a place helping humans unbridle their lives and find inner peace through ponies.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 2: Stories from the Stud
programme.desc: This week Ride seeks out the scorching sands of Kuwait where the Arabian Horse reigns supreme, skims the surf on the Emerald Isle with the Connemara Ponies of Cashel Bay Stud and recognises the dressage stars of the future at the home of Germany’s Olympic Gold Medalist Sonke Rothenberger.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 3: Horses & Heritage
programme.desc: This week Ride travels back in time on the UK’s waterways aboard one of the last remaining horse drawn Barges. We fly high in California with Karrie Rufer, star of the Longines FEI Jumping World Cup North American League, step out with the sure-footed shires as they “Relay” acrross rural England, and witness the spectacle that is the dancing Spanish stallions at the Royal Andalusian School in Jerez.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 2: Stories from the Stud
programme.desc: This week Ride seeks out the scorching sands of Kuwait where the Arabian Horse reigns supreme, skims the surf on the Emerald Isle with the Connemara Ponies of Cashel Bay Stud and recognises the dressage stars of the future at the home of Germany’s Olympic Gold Medalist Sonke Rothenberger.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 3: Horses & Heritage
programme.desc: This week Ride travels back in time on the UK’s waterways aboard one of the last remaining horse drawn Barges. We fly high in California with Karrie Rufer, star of the Longines FEI Jumping World Cup North American League, step out with the sure-footed shires as they “Relay” acrross rural England, and witness the spectacle that is the dancing Spanish stallions at the Royal Andalusian School in Jerez.

programme.title: Horse Academy Pro - Chapter 3
programme.desc: The final episode of this season has arrived, and so has the competition. Riders will face each other in the saddle as they complete a jumping ground. As well as their jumping skills, riders will receive extra points based on the cleanliness of their stables and overall professionalism as equestrians. Want to know what it takes to become the PRO? Come enjoy with us!

programme.title: Polo Rider Cup Competition - Deauville International Polo Club vs Las Brisas Polo Club Of Chicago
programme.desc: This time, Deauville International Polo Club will be up against Las Brisas Polo Club of Chicago in order to keep advancing at the 2021 Polo Rider Cup celebrated in Chantilly. As both teams have been training for this moment, who will be the final victor at the end of the match? Find out on HorseTV.

programme.title: Polo Rider Cup Competition - Moscow Polo Club vs Hamburger Polo Club
programme.desc: In order to advance to the following rounds, Moscow Polo Club will have to face Hamburger Polo Club in this first stage of the Polo Rider Cup 2021. With a 10/12 goals handicap and 5 chukkers, competition between the strongest polo teams in the world is on at the Polo Club de Chantilly. Enjoy the match between Moscow Polo Club and Hamburger Polo Club.

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 4 - Shanghai
programme.desc: Riders have arrived to Shanghai for the fourth leg of the 2019 Global Champions League. The chinese city bursts with things to do, but riders will not have much time to scroll around its streets trying out the delicious food and historical sites as they get ready for a perfect performance in one of the toughest equestrian competitions worldwide. Relive the best moments of the fourth leg of the 2019 GCL

programme.title: CHIO Aachen - Best Moments
programme.desc: Words speak for themselves. An equestrian show unrivalled anywhere in the world, offering the highest level of performance. The CHIO Aachen is probably the most prestigious horse show in Europe when it comes to show jumping and dressage. Riders compete against each other in this episode for victory in the show jumping competition. Relive all the magic moments of the 2019 edition of the CHIO Aachen.

programme.title: Slipstream
programme.desc: In a futuristic world savaged by the slipstream wind, bounty hunter Matt snatches a murderer with a price of his head from lawman Will Tasker.

programme.title: A Boy And His Dog
programme.desc: Vic (Don Johnson) is a libidinous 18-year-old traversing the post-apocalyptic desert of 2024, in the company of his telepathic dog, Blood. When the pair encounter an underground community, the leader's daughter, Quilla Holmes (Susanne Benton), seduces Vic into their fold, separating him from Blood, who's left to survive on his own. But once Vic discovers he's been lured there solely for mechanized procreation, he realizes he's doomed unless he can escape and rejoin Blood.

programme.title: Alice Sweet Alice
programme.desc: Favorite daughter Karen (Brooke Shields) is viciously strangled and set afire in church on the day of her First Communion, and suspicion falls on her jealous and emotionally unstable sister, Alice (Paula E. Sheppard). When the girls' aunt, Annie (Jane Lowry), is later stabbed on an apartment complex stairway, Alice is sent away. But the attacks continue, prompting priest Father Tom (Rudolph Willrich) and Alice's dad, Dominick (Niles McMaster), to go in search of the real killer.

programme.title: One-Eyed Jacks
programme.desc: After pulling a bank heist in Mexico, the outlaw Rio (Marlon Brando) and his partner, Dad Longworth (Karl Malden), make a run for it, but Dad has bigger plans than freedom. He betrays Rio and absconds with the loot, and Rio ends up in prison.

programme.desc: Ex-tennis pro Tony Wendice (Ray Milland) wants to have his wealthy wife, Margot (Grace Kelly), murdered so he can get his hands on her inheritance. When he discovers her affair with Mark Halliday (Robert Cummings), he comes up with the perfect plan to kill her.

programme.title: The Lightkeepers
programme.desc: A grumpy sailor (Richard Dreyfuss) and a young stranger (Tom Wisdom) change their negative opinions about women when two move nearby.

programme.desc: When a young actress (Janet Gaynor) arrives in Hollywood with hopes of stardom, a chance encounter places her under the wing of older actor Norman Maine (Fredric March). Adopting the stage name Vicki Lester, she co-stars with Norman in a major motion picture, but his success is clearly fading even as her career begins. After the couple wed, Vicki's fame continues to grow, but Norman descends into alcoholism, and she must decide between pursuing her dream and caring for him.

programme.title: Not Another Black Movie
programme.desc:
Not Another Black Movie stars Damon Williams (Bad Boys of Comedy, Comic View, BET LIVE, The Tom Joyner Morning Show), Janet Hubert (The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air), Rodney Perry (The Monique Show, Who's Got Jokes) Jay Davis (Not Another Zombie Movie, Shots Fired), and Leon Rogers (WGCI, Comic View, Bad Boys of Comedy).
Not Another Black Movie is not only a spoof of a genre often associated with Tyler Perry films, but a satirical look at family dysfunction as well. Written by Jay Davis and Directed by Donte "Diesel" Williams, Not Another Black Movie addresses issues that effect many families whether they be rich or poor, black or white. Although we poke fun at some of the stereotypical roles portrayed in this genre, we hope to shed some light on problems that plague many families while giving you a good laugh.

programme.desc: 18 year old Amy is kidnapped by a deranged gunman wanted for the murder of an FBI Agent and FBI Agent Megan is hot on his trail. When it's learned that Amy is a type-1 diabetic, Megan must once again confront the man who violently killed her partner to save Amy.

programme.title: Last Chance Cafe
programme.desc: After uncovering evidence that her stepfather was murdered by a ring of corrupt cops and judges, including her DA ex-husband, a woman is forced to flee with her daughter and hide in a small farming town, where she falls for a local ranch owner but danger soon follows.

programme.title: San Saba
programme.desc: Private Investigator Bud wakes from a coma in a hospital room and is immediately charged with murder but did he do it or was he framed? As the story unfolds in flashback, Bud discovers that no one seems to be who he or she claim to be and everyone's motives are suspect.

programme.title: Universal Soldier II: Brothers in Arms
programme.desc: Luc and Veronica recover and revive Luc's long-lost brother who has been suspended in a cryo-chamber for decades and attempt to expose the Unisol program, led by Mazur (Gary Busey), which recycles dead soldiers in the attempt to create the ultimate mercenary army.

programme.title: Max Havoc: Ring of Fire
programme.desc: Max Havoc is on a new assignment staying at a luxury hotel in the heart of a big city only to discover that the classy hotel owner is a vicious mob boss heading up a crime ring full of unwanted teenagers in the nearby slums.

programme.title: Double Cross
programme.desc: Kathy Swanson and her neighbor, Sheryl, are both having difficulty with their husbands. So when Sheryl suggests to Kathy that they should get their lives back by killing each other’s husbands, Kathy facetiously sanctions the plan.

programme.title: Universal Soldier III: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Veronica and Luc conclude their quest to expose the Unisol program to the media and destroy Mentor's (Burt Reynolds) billion dollar heist, while the evil Dr. Walker creates a genetically engineered Unisol GR87, programmed with the single mission to destroy Luc and Veronica.

programme.title: Meditations for Manifestation Trailer
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Material relationships
programme.desc: Start your meditation practice with a few moments of mindful awareness built around the movement of the breath and the sensations of the body. Cultivate equanimity as you notice the rise and fall of physical and emotional feelings. Let Kino help you drop down beneath the frequency of thought, where you can get in touch with your innate wholeness. Work with understanding your natural completeness, as you explore concepts of attachment and aversion. Find yourself in alignment with faith, breaking the inertia of limiting beliefs and thoughts. Practice towards a state of non attachment, a fertile ground in which to plant the seeds of a happier, more peaceful life.

programme.title: Sun Salutations
programme.desc: Join Mark for a class that investigates the main movement positions in the traditional Sun Salutations.

programme.title: Yoga Is Mindfulness
programme.desc: Today we go deeper into understanding what yoga is as we explore mindfulness and the pose Trikonasana. Join Kino as she guides you through a physical practice with a focus on remaining present and judgement free. Use triangle pose as an opportunity to be present with and accepting towards whatever arises in the body and mind as you practice.

programme.title: Connecting to the Soul
programme.desc: Kino sits down to talk with Koya Webb about her southern roots and her California life.

programme.title: Naturally Bliss Trailer
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Meet Alexa
programme.desc: Alexa Soto turned her passion for cooking into a way of life.

programme.title: Alfredo Mushroom Pasta
programme.desc: Vegan fettuccine alfredo is easier to make than you might think.

programme.title: Avocado Fudge Brownies
programme.desc: These avocado fudge brownies are so rich and decadent; you won’t believe they’re vegan!

programme.title: Yoga Is Joy
programme.desc: Open your heart to an experience of pure joy. We’ll use Happy Baby pose to explore what yoga truly is. Flow through child’s pose, puppy pose, squats and hip openers before making your way into the sweet release of Happy Baby. No judgement, no fight, no force… use this practice to touch the unscathed, joyful innocence within you.

programme.title: Yoga Drills Trailer
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Everyday Drill
programme.desc: When it comes to building strength and flexibility for a more well-rounded yoga practice, yoga drills can help you expedite the process! Join Kino for a set of yoga drills that offer a little mix of everything. Stretch out and strengthen the core, legs, arms, shoulders, and everything in between. Just over 20 minutes.

programme.title: Healing and Happiness
programme.desc: Begin practice with a few minutes of mindfulness, feeling the breath and sensation in the body as a way of cultivating inward focus. Shift into a contemplative state, settling the mind below the frequency of thought. Learn to label inner processes in a way that will help you understand the nature of thought and emotion. As the quality of your awareness shifts deeper, Kino will skillfully guide you into a state of contemplation. This practice will help you process emotion and move towards healing and happiness.

programme.title: Yoga Inspiration Podcast - A conversation about communication
programme.desc: Kino sits down to talk with mediator and coach Mia Forbes Pirie. Mia discusses her approach to mediation and gives advice about how to use curiosity to navigate interpersonal conflict. Explore techniques to help you approach life with patience and compassion of yourself and others.

programme.title: How to Become a Rich Yogi - How to quiet our mind
programme.desc: True peace is something that exists inside of you at all times, but the only way to access this peace is by learning to quiet the mind. So how do you do it? Watch the video to find out!

programme.title: Parsvottanasana
programme.desc: This 20 minute practice starts with the basics, building a connection to breath and body. Flow through standing poses that build up to a prop supported variation of Parsvottanasana.

programme.title: Bridge
programme.desc: This practice takes you on a journey through the fundamentals of yoga and culminates in a gentle backbend, the bridge pose

programme.title: Backbend - Listen
programme.desc: Join Kino for as class that’s all about backbends and the journey of listening. Begin to tap into the subtle body as you move through this mindful, 25-minute backbending practice. Talk to your muscles and joints and listen to them as you find the strength and flexibility to move through this practice, all while bringing your awareness to various places in the body.

programme.title: Yoga Is Commitment
programme.desc: This class centers around commitment, so Kino is asking you start by going all in. The intention here is to get you on your mat every day, even if you don’t make it through the whole class, so that you can cultivate greater awareness of your body and mind. In this class we’ll build up to a steady, well constructed Down Dog by focusing on the shoulders in a series of preparatory postures. Flow through child's pose, table top, puppy pose and sun salutations as you create healthy patterns of movement and breath control. The commitment you make to the practice is really a statement of your self worth. Join Kino on the mat and say: I am worth it! I am worth these few moments of precious practice.

programme.title: Meditation Now - The Breath
programme.desc: Join Kino for a gentle meditation on the beach by the beautiful shores of Tulum, Mexico. Let go of your thoughts, and experiences as you use the breath to anchor you to the present moment.

programme.title: Meditation Now - The Body
programme.desc: This is a seaside meditation on the peaceful shores of Tulum, Mexico, guided by Kino MacGregor. Bring your awareness to the gift of your body and move deeply into the inner space of this sacred vessel that carries you through this life.

programme.title: Everyday Strength - Build it up
programme.desc: Build up your strength by building a powerful core. Kino guides you through a plank-focused practice that includes side planks, floating planks, and chaturanga (four-limbed staff pose). You'll ignite your inner fire in this short effective class.

programme.title: Yoga Is Discipline
programme.desc: Don’t be intimidated, but today’s lesson is on discipline. This class is all about how to get on your mat with discipline and enjoy it. To find comfort and determination in Navasana Kino will guide you towards just the right amount of front body engagement as well as a helpful awareness in the deep core. Mix your discipline with a fun loving attitude and feel that energy that comes when you rise up to a challenge. Tap into a place of infinite strength within, a place of spiritual fortitude, a strength rooted in the beyond

programme.title: Yoga Is Strength
programme.desc: So much of Kino's personal journey through yoga has been about learning to be strong. That's why shes so excited to share this class that uses plank pose as a bridge to connecting with your own inner reserves. Tune in and learn alignment and articulation in the body that will help you tap into new levels of strength. This sequence will teach you to feel and engage the back body and deep core in ways that support your yoga journey. You’ll finish this practice with a growing sense of stability and strength in both the body and mind.

programme.title: Yoga Inspiration Podcast - On the path
programme.desc: Join Kino and Rob Mack for a discussion about how to use your thoughts to put you on the path to your highest potential. programme.title: Tree Pose

programme.title: Yoga Is Balance

programme.title: Health
programme.desc: Tune into the breath as an entry way to the present moment. Use this awareness to call your energy back into yourself and cultivate an increasing sense of wellbeing. Feel the sensation of the body and practice acceptance of whatever pleasant or unpleasantness arises. Focus the mind and notice the quality and texture of your thoughts and emotions. Once you settle into practice turn your awareness more fully to the inner experience, planting the seeds of happiness and wellbeing.

programme.title: Everyday Strength - Shoulders and core
programme.desc: Give your strength and confidence a boost when you do this class with Kino. Challenge yourself with floating plank and dolphin plank. Build integrity in the core as you practice navasana (boat pose).

programme.title: Facing Injury in the Practice
programme.desc: When it comes to yoga practice, there's nothing more difficult that facing an injury.

programme.title: Channel Id 3
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Yoga Is Trailer
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Channel Id 2
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Yoga Is Practice
programme.desc: Abhyasa is the sanskrit word for practice. Kino wants to help you find the playful spirit in your heart, even as you commit to practice. Begin the class with breath awareness and some mindful movement. After we warm up we’ll play with forearm plank and leg engagement before moving into the challenge of full Dolphin Pose. Finish class with some reflection on the power of practice and a well earned rest

programme.title: Yoga Is Prayer
programme.desc: Todays class offers an opportunity to understand practice as prayer. Join Kino as she uses Digasana, also known as Warrior 3, as an opportunity to feel the quiet turning inward of the mind. The Warrior postures help you connect to a sense of inner strength. Let Kino guide you through communion with self and you higher power as you flow through a challenging, prop supported balancing sequence.

programme.title: Yoga Inspiration Podcast - How to recharge
programme.desc: Join Kino and Rob Mack for a candid discussion about spiritual burnout and compassion fatigue. Learn how health professionals and people in “giving” professions can find balance and prevent burnout. Find out how each of them recharges when they begin to feel depleted.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Meet Sahara
programme.desc: Get to know Sahara Rose, author, podcast host, speaker and Ayurvedic student/educator. Find out how she first came to discover Ayurveda and how she learned to incorporate the practices of this ancient system into her everyday life to heal herself from the inside out.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Course Intro
programme.desc: This course is focused on merging Ayurveda with modern nutritional science and a dedicated yoga practice so that you can work toward becoming your highest self. But what exactly is Ayurveda? Tune in to find out and discover what this course is all about.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Discover Your Dosha
programme.desc: Why does Ayurveda matter and how can it help you understand yourself and the world around you? In this episode, Sahara will briefly discuss each of the three doshas and what they have to do with you and the foods you eat? Learn about how your digestion can be affected by the doshas, and how the doshas might be affecting you through this brief intro to Ayurveda with Sahara Rose. Less that 20 minutes.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Breakfast for Your Dosha
programme.desc: Today you are going to learn how to start your day in the most effective way according to Ayurveda. Find out why it’s important to have a nourishing breakfast that’s designed for your specific mind-body type. Plus, this episode offers three Smoothie Bowl recipes – one for each of the doshas – that will nourish your body and set the tone for a great day. Less than 40 minutes. Complete Recipes Here - https://bit.ly/2xUOMEQ

programme.title: One Hour Yoga Drills - Core, Shoulders and Splits
programme.desc: Join Kino for a yoga drills class that includes a mix of strength and flexibility. You’ll build a strong core with plank and navasana (boat pose) drills. You’ll also do some hip releases with a focus on hip extension. Next, Kino will guide you through a series of poses to help you progress from crescent lunge to supported splits to full front splits.

programme.title: Yoga for Inflexible People - Try Your Triangle – Triangle Pose
programme.desc: Try out the triangle pose! Today's class will explore this foundational asana through both chair and mat based variations. Under Kino's expert guidance you will get comfortable with the physical practice and start to feel a deep, intentional gratitude too!

programme.title: Yoga for Inflexible People - Awaken the Spine – Cobra Pose
programme.desc: This powerful practice with Kino will awaken the spine, helping you feel healthier and happier. Begin with a mindful moment and then flow through a fun sequence of mat based core-strengthening and backbending postures.

programme.desc: This class is accessible to all, incorporates yoga fundamentals and builds up to Janu Sirsasana A.

programme.desc: A gentle flow that incorporates the fundamentals of yoga and builds up to the arm balance Bakasana, the crane pose.

programme.title: Yoga for Inflexible People - Try Your Triangle – Triangle Pose
programme.desc: Try out the triangle pose! Today's class will explore this foundational asana through both chair and mat based variations. Under Kino's expert guidance you will get comfortable with the physical practice and start to feel a deep, intentional gratitude too!

programme.title: Yoga for Inflexible People - Awaken the Spine – Cobra Pose
programme.desc: This powerful practice with Kino will awaken the spine, helping you feel healthier and happier. Begin with a mindful moment and then flow through a fun sequence of mat based core-strengthening and backbending postures.

programme.title: Omstars Sizzle Reel- no text
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Janu Sirsasana A
programme.desc: This class is accessible to all, incorporates yoga fundamentals and builds up to Janu Sirsasana A.

programme.title: Bakasana
programme.desc: A gentle flow that incorporates the fundamentals of yoga and builds up to the arm balance Bakasana, the crane pose.

programme.title: Yin Yoga for Deep Relaxation and Healing - Open Heart - Calm Your Nerves
programme.desc: Perfect for all levels. Tune in here when you’re wanting to relax and wind down. Originally streamed live on March 26, 2020.

programme.title: Meditation Now - Sharpen the Mind
programme.desc: Find a comfortable seat, close your eyes and imagine yourself sitting in the warm sand on a beautiful beach as you join Kino for today’s meditation. Sharpen the edge of the mind as you bring your awareness to a single point of focus.

programme.title: Crispy Orange Cauliﬂower “Chicken”
programme.desc: It’s a spin on Orange Chicken – learn how to make this delicious, crispy orange cauliflower with Alexa Soto.

programme.title: Channel Id 3
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Channel Id 1
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Seated Sequence
programme.desc: Join Mark for a class that explores the patterns of the seated postures from the Ashtanga Yoga Primary series.

programme.title: Breathwork
programme.desc: Use this practice to work with improving your 3-dimensional breathing.

programme.title: Yoga Is Trailer
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Yoga Is Awakening
programme.desc: Yoga is a path to personal awakening. In today’s lesson we will use the crescent lunge to awaken the energy at the core of your being. Begin with centering breath work and then flow through some warm ups and sun salutations as you bring awareness to the energetic life of the body. Take it nice and easy as you make your way into Anjaneyasana, finding and being at peace with your individual limits in the posture. Kino will guide you into feeling the sensation in the hips and spine, noticing the changes in the body and and letting the practice fuel a sense of awakening.

programme.title: Yoga Is Unity
programme.desc: The traditional definition of yoga is unity. We will explore this concept through the restorative Pigeon Pose. Begin practice with a reflection on the connection between breath, body and mind. Next, move through a series of long holds in child’s pose, puppy poses and forward folding. Take a supported hip opener using props if you have them handy and then move into another long hold, this time in Pigeon Pose. Take note of any sensations and feelings that arise, offering yourself true care and opening up to a sense of wholeness.

programme.title: Yoga Inspiration Podcast - A conversation about communication
programme.desc: Kino sits down to talk with mediator and coach Mia Forbes Pirie. Mia discusses her approach to mediation and gives advice about how to use curiosity to navigate interpersonal conflict. Explore techniques to help you approach life with patience and compassion of yourself and others.

programme.title: Creamy Curry Ramen
programme.desc: This Ramen Curry dish is easy to make and perfect for when you’re craving some vegan Thai food.

programme.title: How to Become a Rich Yogi - Meet Robert Mack
programme.desc: Get to know a little about Robert Mack, including what led him to becoming a happiness coach, and what he finds inspiring about seeking happiness in life.

programme.title: How to Become a Rich Yogi - Intro
programme.desc: Learn a little bit about what this course’s 8 videos are all about and how to watch and get the most value out of them.

programme.title: How to Become a Rich Yogi - My experience + how I have come to become a happiness coach
programme.desc: This video will give you a little more background about Robert Mack, and how he got to where he is today as a Happiness Coach. Plus, learn some interesting facts about the rates that people of this day and age are experiencing success and anxiety.

programme.title: How to Become a Rich Yogi - Happiness is the master key to success
programme.desc: According to Robert Mack, even though we may think it does, success doesn’t lead to happiness. Learn a little more about why this is the case, and a little bit about why happiness is actually what leads to success.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Meet Sahara
programme.desc: Get to know Sahara Rose, author, podcast host, speaker and Ayurvedic student/educator. Find out how she first came to discover Ayurveda and how she learned to incorporate the practices of this ancient system into her everyday life to heal herself from the inside out.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Course Intro
programme.desc: This course is focused on merging Ayurveda with modern nutritional science and a dedicated yoga practice so that you can work toward becoming your highest self. But what exactly is Ayurveda? Tune in to find out and discover what this course is all about.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Lunch for your Dosha
programme.desc: In this episode, Sahara Rose will teach you how to make a very simple Lunch Bowl that will energize your body and optimize your digestion. Plus, you’ll learn about Ayurveda’s theory of the six tastes, how to use the six tastes when constructing a meal, and what ingredients to add or avoid depending on your dosha. Less than 15 minutes. Complete Recipes Here - https://bit.ly/2xUOMEQ

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Meditation for Vata
programme.desc: Did you know that different yoga and meditation practices are recommended for the different doshas? Join Sahara Rose for a meditation that’s designed for Vata Dosha individuals. About 10 minutes.

programme.title: Jackfruit Green Enchiladas with Cashew Crema v2
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: One Hour Yoga Drills - Hip Flexion and Extension
programme.desc: Focus on opening the front of the hips for splits in this yoga drills class with Kino. Warm up with shoulder drills in tabletop pose and bird dog drills. Strengthen your glutes and release your hips with standing splits. Work on strength and flexibility of the hamstrings, hips, and quads in variations of heron pose.

programme.title: Yoga Nidra for Chakra Balancing
programme.desc: Join Irene for a yoga nidra that’s designed to promote Chakra balancing.

programme.title: Patio & Garden Clearance
programme.desc: As the days get longer, join us as we enjoy the great outdoors with decorating styles and ideas on Patio & Garden. Our show offers everything from deck accessories to decorative items, fountains to fertilizer, outdoor furniture to outdoor lighting, pressure washers to plants, and more. Don't miss Patio & Garden, and get your spring started early.

programme.title: You Can Do It! - (Home) Safety First featuring Ring
programme.desc: No, really—you can! Join Lisette Janae and her crew of experts and get ready to build your DIY skills (and confidence!) from the ground up with helpful home how-tos—and shop all of the essentials you need for your (literal) toolbox. Whether you’re taking on simple projects like organizing your closet, jumpstarting your garden, or just looking to spruce up your space, Lisette and friends have the simple step-by-step instructions to transform your “honey do” list into a “honey, I did!” list. Watch and shop this original show, and so many more, exclusively on the free QVC+ and HSN+ TV streaming service.

programme.title: HSN Gets Crafty - Elevated Rub-Ons
programme.desc: Whether you are an experienced crafter or just getting started, HSN Gets Crafty with Suzanne is your home for connecting with the crafting community and learning together.

programme.title: Design School with Ballard Designs - Kid-Friendly Design
programme.desc: For over 4 decades, Ballard Designs has been the pinnacle of interior design, long known for their discerning eye and tasteful elegance. Now, they’re demystifying home design in a way only they know how. Join Ballard Design Senior Marketing Manager Caroline McDonald and top-notch interior design experts as they help you shape your space with gorgeous visuals and years of wisdom during Design School with Ballard Designs. From choosing color with confidence to finding the perfect furniture flow and beyond, empower yourself with the know-how you need right now as well as the perfect pieces you need to accomplish it. With the right products and quick, smart style solutions, great design is easy to achieve!

programme.title: Look on the Bright Side with Pat & Rick
programme.desc: No one can bring a smile to your face AND to your Sunday like Program Hosts and longtime friends Pat James-DeMentri and Rick Domeier. Join them for Look on the Bright Side with Pat & Rick as they kick off your Sunday with some of their favorite finds; our biggest items of the day, like our Today's Special Value®; PLUS a peek at what's new and what's coming up in the week ahead. So, whether you're up with the sun, or you're still waiting for that coffee to kick in, Look on the Bright Side with Pat & Rick, Sunday mornings on QVC®

programme.title: Doll 10 Beauty
programme.desc: Give them 10 minutes, and Doll 10 Beauty will change the way you see yourself. It's not just their name, it's their mission to get you Dolled Up in 10 minutes or less. The goal is simple. Doll 10 strives to deliver cruelty-free beauty solutions that are as effective as they are easy to use, as good to your skin as they are to your confidence and as hard-working as you are. Celebrate the feeling of beautiful with Doll 10 Beauty. "

programme.title: Laura Geller Makeup Studio
programme.desc: A top New York City makeup artist, Laura Geller is known in the industry as an innovator who creates makeup colors and formulas that appeal to all women. Her approach to makeup, and her popular Laura Geller Makeup Collection, is that it should deliver professional quality results with simple, no instructions required application. Her experience has led her to create a line of multi-purpose baked color cosmetics, her uniquely Italian, handcrafted Baked Color Cosmetics Collection, designed to adjust to your skin tone and deliver more than ordinary powder, with exceptional luminosity for a flawless, radiant look. Discover the believable beauty of baked Laura Geller makeup, iconic favorites such as Laura Geller Spackle and innovative formulas and inspiring new products in wonderfully wearable colors based on real beauty needs, not soon-to-be-forgotten trends. Let Laura Geller take the guesswork out of cosmetics application with expert advice, time-saving tips and high-performance products for easily achievable looks. For makeup that's inviting, innovative, informative and ingenious - look no further than Laura Geller Makeup Studio on QVC(R). Laura Geller ... Beauty Ingenuity.

programme.title: (Pretty Much) - Rose-Marie Swift - Conversations About Beauty with People Over 40
programme.desc: (Pretty Much) Conversations About Beauty With People Over 40 is a series of intimate, sincere, and frank conversations about inner and outer beauty issues that are relevant especially to people over the age of 40. Each episode features a guest over the age of 40, talking with an off-camera producer about a beauty topic specific to their personal experience, while applying their own makeup in a mirror. The focus is on the conversation, almost like that conversation you have while doing touch-ups in the ladies’ room when you’re out with friends. It’s available on the QVC & HSN Streaming Service, and on QVC +.

programme.desc: Age is celebrated, never feared, during Timeless Beauty on QVC+ and HSN+. programme.title: Gourmet Holiday
programme.desc: Make every day a Gourmet Holiday with delicious sweets, meats and treats delivered right to your door - or some else's! From crab cakes to cheesecakes, we'll bring you a mouthwatering menu of easy-to-make and ready-to-serve food sure to delight family, friends and especially you!

programme.title: Chef Curtis Stone Celebration
programme.desc: Discover Chef Curtis Stone's collection of kitchenware that simplifies prep and makes cooking fun.

programme.title: Getting Grilled with Curtis Stone - Debbie Gibson
programme.desc: Things are heating up on Getting Grilled with Curtis Stone – an original video podcast show that will give you something to chew on. Join award-winning chef and the man behind one of the top-rated brands on HSN®, Curtis Stone, as he puts his guests from the worlds of film, music, sports, and beyond in the hot seat. Together, they’re cooking up flavorful convos—and foods—and digging into everything from current events to personal stories, to meals that left their mark. Whether you consider yourself a foodie, a pop culture expert, or somewhere in between, there’s sure to be a (sound) bite for you – streaming free, only on HSN+.

programme.title: David Rocco’s Dolce Southeast Asia - Women in Bangkok
programme.desc: Travel alongside international celebrity chef and author David Rocco as he falls in love with the sights, smells, and of course, flavors of Southeast Asia. Join David as he explores Vietnam, Cambodia, Thailand, Malaysia, and Singapore to learn about the traditional dishes and street eats foodies all around the world rave about. Get a first-hand look at the unique cultures thriving in rural villages, the bustling cosmopolitan cities, and hear inspiring stories told by people who call it home – only in David Rocco's Southeast Asia.

programme.title: David Rocco’s Dolce Southeast Asia - Art in the City
programme.desc: Travel alongside international celebrity chef and author David Rocco as he falls in love with the sights, smells, and of course, flavors of Southeast Asia. Join David as he explores Vietnam, Cambodia, Thailand, Malaysia, and Singapore to learn about the traditional dishes and street eats foodies all around the world rave about. Get a first-hand look at the unique cultures thriving in rural villages, the bustling cosmopolitan cities, and hear inspiring stories told by people who call it home – only in David Rocco's Southeast Asia.

programme.title: Dishin' It - Magic Moments featuring MacKenzie-Childs
programme.desc: Pull up a chair and get ready to dig into the tastiest talk show because these foodies are Dishin’ It out! Pull up to the most popular potluck in town where our hungry hosts are bringing you the beginner-friendly recipes they’ve been craving—as well as the how-tos, brands, and products you need to serve them up yourself! It’s a full course meal featuring food, fun, and friends. Watch and shop, only on the free QVC+ and HSN+ streaming service.

programme.title: Getting Grilled with Curtis Stone - Debbie Gibson
programme.desc: Things are heating up on Getting Grilled with Curtis Stone – an original video podcast show that will give you something to chew on. Join award-winning chef and the man behind one of the top-rated brands on HSN®, Curtis Stone, as he puts his guests from the worlds of film, music, sports, and beyond in the hot seat. Together, they’re cooking up flavorful convos—and foods—and digging into everything from current events to personal stories, to meals that left their mark. Whether you consider yourself a foodie, a pop culture expert, or somewhere in between, there’s sure to be a (sound) bite for you – streaming free, only on HSN+.

programme.title: David Rocco’s Dolce Southeast Asia - Women in Bangkok
programme.desc: Travel alongside international celebrity chef and author David Rocco as he falls in love with the sights, smells, and of course, flavors of Southeast Asia. Join David as he explores Vietnam, Cambodia, Thailand, Malaysia, and Singapore to learn about the traditional dishes and street eats foodies all around the world rave about. Get a first-hand look at the unique cultures thriving in rural villages, the bustling cosmopolitan cities, and hear inspiring stories told by people who call it home – only in David Rocco's Southeast Asia.

programme.title: David Rocco’s Dolce Southeast Asia - Art in the City
programme.desc: Travel alongside international celebrity chef and author David Rocco as he falls in love with the sights, smells, and of course, flavors of Southeast Asia. Get a first-hand look at the unique cultures thriving in rural villages, the bustling cosmopolitan cities, and hear inspiring stories told by people who call it home – only in David Rocco's Southeast Asia.

programme.title: Dishin' It - Magic Moments featuring MacKenzie-Childs
programme.desc: Pull up a chair and get ready to dig into the tastiest talk show because these foodies are Dishin’ It out! Pull up to the most popular potluck in town where our hungry hosts are bringing you the beginner-friendly recipes they’ve been craving—as well as the how-tos, brands, and products you need to serve them up yourself! It’s a full course meal featuring food, fun, and friends. Watch and shop, only on the free QVC+ and HSN+ streaming service.

programme.title: Gourmet Holiday
programme.desc: Make every day a Gourmet Holiday with delicious sweets, meats and treats delivered right to your door - or some else's! From crab cakes to cheesecakes, we'll bring you a mouthwatering menu of easy-to-make and ready-to-serve food sure to delight family, friends and especially you!

programme.title: Dr. Nassif Skincare
programme.desc: Renowned surgeon Dr. Paul Nassif created an anti-aging skincare line to fight the effects of time.

programme.title: Active at Any Age with Elise Ivy - Home Workouts with Fiona Summers
programme.desc: You know what they say, the best time to figure out your fitness is yesterday. The next best time is NOW during Active at Any Age, only on QVC+ and HSN+. No matter where you find yourself on your life's journey, watch and shop along with actress and CEO of ROKNE Pickleball, Elise Ivy, as she helps you level up your physical wellness in a way you never have before. Discover inspiration for how to get your movement on, expert tips to make the most of any activity, and the fitness gear you need to look as good as you feel. It’s all streaming here, only on QVC+ and HSN+.

programme.title: Laura Geller's Beauty Besties x Beekman 1802
programme.desc: Renowned New York makeup artist Laura Geller joins her Beauty Besties Dr. Brent Ridge and Josh Kilmer-Purcell of Beekman 1802 skin and body care as they talk self-care from head to toe.

programme.title: Behind the Brand: Le Creuset with David Venable
programme.desc: Get the story behind your favorite brands - told by the inspiring individuals that created them! Join us for Behind the Brand where we’ll share exclusive interviews, tips and tricks, and more from the individuals who curated the iconic labels you know and love – exclusively on QVC+ and HSN+.

programme.title: LifeStyled - Mauve & Suave Cooking featuring Le Creuset
programme.desc: Are you suffering from inspiration frustration? Is your dream aesthetic just...well, a dream? No more! It’s time to make your vision a reality during LifeStyled. Whether you’re picturing something mild, wild, or anywhere in between, we’re got the simple steps and on-trend finds to take your look from drab to fab. Level up everything from your wardrobe to your home as you shop leading brands in fashion, decor, and more that effortlessly elevate your space and give you the look you’ve been searching for. It’s streaming free, only on QVC+ and HSN+.

programme.title: Shoe Shopping with Jane
programme.desc: Footwear & Fun with Program Host Jane Treacy

programme.title: HSN Gets Crafty - Card Kits with Kingston Crafts
programme.desc: Whether you are an experienced crafter or just getting started, HSN Gets Crafty with Suzanne is your home for connecting with the crafting community and learning together.

programme.title: G by Giuliana Rancic Fashion
programme.desc: Discover a must have fashion and accessories collection from television personality Giuliana Rancic. The separates, jackets, accessories are all offered in a variety of beautiful colors and styles. Look fabulous in these flattering timeless fashions.

programme.title: LOGO by Lori Goldstein(R)
programme.desc: New York's Lori Goldstein is one of the most influential fashion stylists in the industry, having worked with leading photographers, top fashion magazines and legendary designers over the last three decades. Known as the "insider's insider," Lori brings her impeccable taste and eclectic sense of style to QVC® with LOGO by Lori Goldstein® - a collection of contemporary separates and accessories inspired by Lori's unparalleled imagination and her keen ability to set the trends. Let Lori show you how to let your personal style shine through and love how you look as she shares her signature collection of fashion, footwear, handbags and accessories. Add some star-power to your wardrobe and have fun with fashion when you wear LOGO by Lori Goldstein.

programme.title: Seasoned: The QVC(R) Chefs
programme.desc: Seasoned celebrates the inspiring culinary journeys of accomplished women chefs who have earned their space at the table through years of hard work and passion. Join each chef in the kitchen as they share stories of their personal challenges, cultural influences, and their best-kept recipes that give “made with love” a whole new meaning. Cook along and discover the inspiring techniques and tools that made these chefs top of their field. Streaming free, only on QVC+.

programme.title: Serve Up Summer
programme.desc: Turn up the YUM this summer with all kinds of crafty culinary ways to eat well.

programme.title: David's Recipe Corner - Tuna Casserole
programme.desc: If you’re a fan of the recipes on In the Kitchen with David® or an avid reader of Program Host David Venable’s best-selling cookbooks, David’s Recipe Corner is the place for you! Every month, grab your apron and watch, shop, and cook along with QVC's Resident Foodie as he guides you through step-by-step recipes that are as easy to make as they are delicious—PLUS the brands that make preparing them a breeze. And it’s all streaming free, only on QVC+.

programme.title: Doll 10 Beauty
programme.desc: Give them 10 minutes, and Doll 10 Beauty will change the way you see yourself. It's not just their name, it's their mission to get you Dolled Up in 10 minutes or less. The goal is simple. Doll 10 strives to deliver cruelty-free beauty solutions that are as effective as they are easy to use, as good to your skin as they are to your confidence and as hard-working as you are. Celebrate the feeling of beautiful with Doll 10 Beauty. "

programme.title: You Can Do It! - The Big Spring Clean with Chris Campanelli
programme.desc: No, really—you can! Join Lisette Janae and her crew of experts and get ready to build your DIY skills (and confidence!) from the ground up with helpful home how-tos—and shop all of the essentials you need for your (literal) toolbox. Whether you’re taking on simple projects like organizing your closet, jumpstarting your garden, or just looking to spruce up your space, Lisette and friends have the simple step-by-step instructions to transform your “honey do” list into a “honey, I did!” list. Watch and shop this original show, and so many more, exclusively on the free QVC+ and HSN+ TV streaming service.
